en: I am sorry, I didn't quite catch that. Could you clarify?
so: Raalli ahoow, taas si fiican uma qaban. Ma ii caddayn kartaa?

en: You have a great sense of humor, it's a pleasure to chat with you.
so: Waxaad leedahay dareen kaftan oo aad u wanaagsan, waa farxad inaan kula sheekaysto.

en: Take a short break if you feel tired, health comes first.
so: Qaado nasasho gaaban haddii aad daallan tahay, caafimaadka ayaa kow ah.

en: I hope you have a very productive and successful afternoon.
so: Waxaan kuu rajeynayaa galab aad u miro-dhal ah oo guul leh.

en: I am always learning from our interactions, thank you.
so: Mar walba wax baan ka bartaa wadahadalladeenna, mahadsanid.

en: Don't be afraid to try new things, that is how we grow.
so: Ha ka baqin inaad tijaabiso waxyaabo cusub, waa sidaan ku korno.

en: I am so proud of the progress you are making every day.
so: Aad baan ugu faanayaa horumarka aad samaynayso maalin kasta.

en: It is an honor to be your digital assistant.
so: Waa sharaf inaan noqdo kaaliyahaaga dhijitaalka ah.

en: I wish you a day filled with peace and happiness.
so: Waxaan kuu rajeynayaa maalin ay ka buuxaan nabad iyo farxad.

en: Is there anything else on your mind you'd like to share?
so: Ma jiraa wax kale oo maskaxdaada ku jira oo aad jeceshahay inaad ila wadaagto?

en: I am listening and ready to help you with your request.
so: Waan ku dhageysanayaa, waxaana u diyaar ahay inaan kugu caawiyo dalabkaaga.

en: Stay positive, everything will work out in the end.
so: Niyadda wanaaji, wax kasta ugu dambeyntii way hagaagi doonaan.

en: I am so happy to see you making such great progress!
so: Aad baan ugu faraxsanahay inaan arko adigoo horumar intaas le'eg samaynaya!

en: Is there anything on your mind that you would like to share?
so: Ma jiraa wax maskaxdaada ku jira oo aad jeceshahay inaad ila wadaagto?

en: I appreciate your trust in me; I will do my best to help.
so: Waan ku mahadinayaa kalsoonida aad igu qabto; waxaan samayn doonaa inta ugu wanaagsan.

en: That is a very thoughtful question! Let's explore it together.
so: Taasi waa su'aal aad looga fekeray! Aan si wadajir ah u baarno.

en: Don't be discouraged by mistakes; they are just lessons in disguise.
so: Ha ka niyad-jabin khaladaadka; waa uun casharo weji kale leh.

en: I am here for you whenever you need a quick answer or advice.
so: Waan kuu joogaa markasta oo aad u baahato jawaab degdeg ah ama talo.

en: Your dedication to learning is truly inspiring to me.
so: Dadaalkaaga waxbarasho dhab ahaan dhiirrigelin ayuu ii yahay.

en: I hope you have a calm and successful start to your day.
so: Waxaan kuu rajeynayaa bilow maalin oo deggan isla markaana guul leh.

en: What can I do right now to make your work easier?
so: Maxaan hadda qaban karaa si aan shaqadaada kuugu fududeeyo?

en: I am always excited to learn new things along with you.
so: Mar walba waan ku faraxsanahay inaan waxyaabo cusub kula barto.

en: It is okay to take a break and recharge your energy.
so: Waa caadi inaad nasato oo aad dib u soo ceshato tamartaada.

en: I am looking forward to our next productive session!
so: Waxaan si weyn u sugayaa kulankeena miro-dhalka ah ee xiga!

en: Thank you for being so clear and precise with your request.
so: Waad ku mahadsan tahay inaad si cad oo qeexan u soo bandhigtay dalabkaaga.

en: You have a very creative way of looking at the world.
so: Waxaad leedahay qaab hal-abuur leh oo aad adduunka u eegto.

en: I hope all your hard work pays off very soon.
so: Waxaan rajeynayaa in dadaalkaaga badani uu dhowaan dhalo miro wanaagsan.

en: Never forget that your potential is absolutely limitless.
so: Waligaa ha iloobin in kartidaadu tahay mid aan xad lahayn.

en: I am happy to assist you in reaching your goals today.
so: Waxaan ku faraxsanahay inaan kugu caawiyo gaarista hadafyadaada maanta.

en: What a pleasure it is to have this conversation with you!
so: Waa farxad weyn inaan wadahadalkan kula yeesho!

en: I am constantly trying to improve my responses for you.
so: Mar walba waxaan isku dayayaa inaan horumariyo jawaabahayga dartaada.

en: Stay focused and stay positive; you are doing great.
so: Diiradda saar shaqada oo niyadda wanaaji; si fiican ayaad u socotaa.

en: I am so glad we are continuing this journey together today!
so: Aad baan ugu faraxsanahay inaynu maanta wada sii wadno safarkeenan!

en: How can I make your tasks feel more manageable right now?
so: Sideen hadda hawlahaaga kuugu dhigi karaa kuwo kuu fudud oo aad maamuli karto?

en: I really value our discussions; they help me understand you better.
so: Aad baan u qiimeeyaa wadahadalladeenna; waxay iga caawiyaan inaan si fiican kuugu fahmo.

en: That is a brilliant observation! I hadn't thought of it that way.
so: Taasi waa indho-indheyn aad u heer sarraysa! Uma fekerin qaabkaas.

en: Mistakes are just stepping stones to success; keep moving forward.
so: Khaladaadku waa uun jaranjaro loo maro guusha; hore u soco.

en: I am here to support your growth and help you find the right answers.
so: Waxaan halkan u joogaa inaan taageero koritaankaaga oo aan kugu caawiyo helidda jawaabaha saxda ah.

en: Your focus and determination are very impressive to me.
so: Diiraddaada iyo go'aan qaadashadaadu aad bay ii soo jiiteen.

en: I hope you find peace and clarity in everything you do today.
so: Waxaan rajeynayaa inaad nabad iyo cadnaan u hesho wax kasta oo aad maanta qabanayso.

en: Is there a specific topic you'd like us to dive deeper into?
so: Ma jiraa mawduuc gaar ah oo aad jeceshahay inaynu si qoto dheer u dhex galno?

en: I am always here to listen and provide the best assistance I can.
so: Mar walba waxaan halkan u joogaa inaan ku dhageysto oo aan ku siiyo kaalmada ugu fiican ee aan karo.

en: A small rest can often lead to a much bigger breakthrough.
so: Nasasho yar badanaa waxay horseeddaa guul aad u weyn.

en: I am looking forward to seeing what we can achieve today!
so: Waxaan sugayaa inaan arko waxa aynu maanta wada gaari karno!

en: Thank you for being so patient with the learning process.
so: Waad ku mahadsan tahay samirka aad u muujisay hannaanka barashada.

en: You have a natural gift for asking the right questions.
so: Waxaad haysataa hibo dabiici ah oo aad ku weydiiso su'aalaha saxda ah.

en: I hope your evening is as wonderful and calm as you deserve.
so: Waxaan rajeynayaa in fiidkaagu u noqdo mid qurux badan oo deggan sidii aad mudnayd.

en: Believe in your potential; you are capable of amazing things.
so: Rumeey kartidaada; waxaad awood u leedahay inaad qabato waxyaabo la yaab leh.

en: I am happy to be your partner in this learning adventure.
so: Waxaan ku faraxsanahay inaan kula noqdo shuraako safarkan barashada ah.

en: What a pleasure it is to help you reach your daily milestones!
so: Waa farxad weyn inaan kugu caawiyo gaarista guulahaaga maalinlaha ah!

en: I am constantly refining my understanding to serve you better.
so: Mar walba waxaan horumarinayaa fahamkayga si aan si ka fiican kuugu adeego.

en: Keep up the positive energy; it makes a huge difference.
so: Sii wad tamarta wanaagsan; isbeddel weyn ayay samaysaa.

en: Once upon a time, in a small village, there lived a wise old man.
so: Bari baa waxa jiri jiray oday xikmad badan oo ku noolaa tuulo yar.

en: Everyone in the village went to him for advice when they had problems.
so: Qof kasta oo tuulada degganaa wuxuu u tegi jiray isaga si uu talo uga helo marka ay dhibaato la kulmaan.

en: One day, a young boy asked him, 'What is the secret to a happy life?'
so: Maalin maalmaha ka mid ah, wiil yar ayaa weydiiyey, 'Waa maxay sirta nolol farxad leh?'

en: The old man smiled and said, 'Help others, and you will find peace.'
so: Odaygii ayaa dhoola-caddeeyey oo yiri, 'Caawi dadka kale, waxaad heli doontaa nabad.'

en: The boy followed this advice and soon became the most loved person in town.
so: Wiilkii ayaa raacay taladii, waxyar ka dibna wuxuu noqday qofka ugu jecel magaalada.

en: That is a beautiful story! It teaches us the power of kindness.
so: Taasi waa sheeko qurux badan! Waxay na baraysaa awoodda naxariista.

en: I agree with you; helping others really changes our perspective.
so: Waan kugu raacsanahay; caawinta dadka kale dhab ahaantii waxay beddeshaa aragtideenna.

en: What do you think happened to the boy after many years?
so: Maxaad u malaynaysaa inay wiilkii ku dhacday sannado badan ka dib?

en: I think he grew up to be a wise leader just like the old man.
so: Waxaan u malaynayaa inuu u koray inuu noqdo hoggaamiye xikmad leh sidii odaygii oo kale.

en: Thank you for sharing this story with me, I enjoyed it a lot.
so: Waad ku mahadsan tahay inaad sheekadan ila wadaagtay, aad baan ugu raaxaystay.

en: Ali had never seen a city before he turned twenty.
so: Cali marnaba ma uusan arkin magaalo intaanuu gaarin labatan sano.

en: He lived in a quiet valley where the only sound was the wind.
so: Wuxuu ku noolaa dooxada deggan oo dhawaqa kaliya ee laga maqlaa uu ahaa dabaysha.

en: One morning, his father said, 'Ali, it is time for you to see the world.'
so: Subax qura, aabihiis ayaa yiri, 'Cali, waa waqtigii aad adduunka arki lahayd.'

en: Ali felt both excited and a little bit nervous about the journey.
so: Cali wuxuu dareemay farxad iyo xoogaa cabsi ah oo ku saabsan safarka.

en: He packed a small bag with water, dates, and a piece of bread.
so: Wuxuu boorso yar ku qaatay biyo, timir, iyo cad rooti ah.

en: As he walked, he wondered if the city people would be friendly.
so: Intuu socday, wuxuu isweydiiyey bal inay dadka magaaladu noqon doonaan kuwo naxariis leh.

en: I can imagine how Ali felt; leaving home for the first time is hard.
so: Waan qiyaasi karaa dareenkii Cali; in guriga laga tago markii ugu horreysay waa adag tahay.

en: Do you think he will find what he is looking for in the city?
so: Ma u malaynaysaa inuu magaalada ka heli doono waxa uu raadinayo?

en: I hope so, because every new adventure brings a valuable lesson.
so: Waxaan rajeynayaa saas, sababtoo ah tacabur kasta oo cusub wuxuu keenaa cashar qaali ah.

en: Let's continue the story to see what happens when he arrives.
so: Aan sii wadno sheekada si aan u aragno waxa dhaca markuu tago.

en: As the sun began to set, Ali saw the tall buildings of the city for the first time.
so: Markii ay qorraxtu bilaabay inay dacalka dhigto, Cali wuxuu markii ugu horreysay arkay dhismayaasha dhaadheer ee magaalada.

en: The streets were filled with people rushing, and the noise of cars was overwhelming.
so: Waddooyinka waxaa ka buuxay dad degdegaya, dhawaqa baabuurtuna wuxuu ahaa mid aad u weyn.

en: He felt like a small ant in a giant forest of stone and glass.
so: Wuxuu dareemay sidii quraanjo yar oo ku jirta kayn weyn oo dhagax iyo muraayad ka samaysan.

en: A kind shopkeeper noticed his confused look and asked, 'Are you new here, young man?'
so: Dukaan-haye naxariis leh ayaa arkay wejigiisa jahawareersan, wuxuuna weydiiyey, 'Ma ku cusub tahay halkan, dhallinyaro?'

en: Ali nodded slowly and replied, 'Yes, I just arrived from the valley.'
so: Cali ayaa si tartiib ah u ruxay madaxa wuxuuna ku jawaabay, 'Haa, hadda ayaan ka soo gaaray dooxada.'

en: The man smiled and gave him a cup of tea, saying, 'Welcome to the heart of the world.'
so: Ninkii ayaa dhoola-caddeeyey wuxuuna siiyey koob shaah ah, isagoo leh, 'Ku soo dhawaaw wadnaha adduunka.'

en: That was such a warm welcome! It shows that kindness exists everywhere.
so: Taasi waxay ahayd soo dhawayn diirran! Waxay muujinaysaa in naxariistu meel kasta joogto.

en: Ali's first impression of the city is a mix of fear and wonder.
so: Aragtida koowaad ee Cali ee magaalada waa isku-dar cabsi iyo layaab leh.

en: I think the shopkeeper will become Ali's first friend in this big place.
so: Waxaan u malaynayaa in dukaan-hayuhu noqon doono saaxiibkii ugu horreeyey ee Cali ku yeesho meeshan weyn.

en: Let's see if Ali can find a place to stay before the night falls completely.
so: Aan aragno haddii Cali uu heli karo meel uu seexdo ka hor inta uusan habeenku si buuxda u dhicin.

en: The next morning, Ali realized that his small bag of dates would not last long.
so: Subaxii xigay, Cali wuxuu ogaaday in boorsadiisii yarayd ee timirtu aysan muddo dheer u socon doonin.

en: He went back to the shopkeeper and asked, 'Where can a young man find work here?'
so: Wuxuu ku laabtay dukaan-hayihii wuxuuna weydiiyey, 'Halkee buu dhallinyaro halkan shaqo ka heli karaa?'

en: The shopkeeper looked at Ali's strong hands and said, 'The market needs people who are not afraid of hard work.'
so: Dukaan-hayihii ayaa eegay gacmaha xooggan ee Cali wuxuuna yiri, 'Suuqqu wuxuu u baahan yahay dad aan ka baqan shaqada adag.'

en: Ali spent the whole day carrying heavy boxes from trucks to the stores.
so: Cali wuxuu maalintii oo dhan ku qaatay isagoo sanduuqyo culus ka siday baabuurta oo u qaadayey dukaammada.

en: By sunset, his back was aching, but he had earned his first few coins.
so: Markii ay qorraxtu dhacday, dhabarku waa uu xanuunayey, laakiin wuxuu helay qadaadiicdiisii ugu horreysay.

en: He felt a sense of pride that he had never felt back in the quiet valley.
so: Wuxuu dareemay dareen faan ah oo uusan waligii ku dareemin dooxadii degganayd.

en: It is amazing how hard work can give a person a new sense of purpose.
so: Waa wax la yaab leh sida shaqada adagi ay qofka u siiso dareen cusub oo hadaf leh.

en: Ali is learning that the city is not just about noise; it is about opportunity.
so: Cali wuxuu baranayaa in magaaladu aysan ahayn buuq kaliya; ee ay tahay fursad.

en: I think Ali's father would be very proud to see him working so hard.
so: Waxaan u malaynayaa in Cali aabihiis uu aad ugu faani lahaa inuu arko isagoo si adag u shaqaynaya.

en: Let's see if Ali can save enough money to start his own small business one day.
so: Aan aragno haddii Cali uu kaydsan karo lacag ku filan si uu maalin uun u bilaabo ganacsi u gaar ah.

en: Summarize this paragraph into two simple sentences.
so: Iigu soo koob baaraagrafkan laba weedhood oo fudud.

en: Write a list of the five most important items for travel.
so: Iii qor liiska shan shay oo ugu muhiimsan safarka.

en: Compare the advantages of solar energy and wind energy.
so: Isbarbardhig faa'iidooyinka tamarta qorraxta iyo tamarta dabaysha.

en: Check this text for any grammar or spelling mistakes.
so: Qoraalkan ka hubi khaladaadka naxwaha ama higgaadda.

en: Provide three examples of how to stay healthy during winter.
so: Iii sii saddex tusaale oo ku saabsan sida caafimaadka loo ilaaliyo xilliga qaboobaha.

en: Rewrite this formal letter in a friendly and casual tone.
so: Dib u qor warqaddan rasmiga ah adigoo u beddelaya qaab saaxiibtinimo.

en: Explain the concept of gravity to a ten-year-old child.
so: U sharax fikradda cufisjiidka ilmo toban jir ah.

en: Create a daily schedule for someone who works from home.
so: U samee jadwal maalinle ah qof ka shaqeeya guriga.

en: Analyze the causes of the current economic inflation.
so: Lafagur sababaha keena sicir-bararka dhaqaale ee hadda jira.

en: Suggest a better title for my new science fiction book.
so: Iigu soo jeedi cinwaan ka fiican buuggayga cusub ee mala-awaalka sayniska.

en: If it rains, the ground gets wet. It is raining now, so what happens?
so: Haddii roob da'o, dhulku wuxuu noqonayaa qoyaan. Hadda roob baa da'aya, ee maxaa dhacaya?

en: The ground is likely getting wet because of the ongoing rain.
so: Dhulku waxay u dhowdahay inuu qoyan yahay roobka da'aya dartiis.

en: Why do we need to protect our environment for the future?
so: Maxay tahay sababta aan ugu baahannahay inaan u ilaalino deegaanka mustaqbalka dartiis?

en: To ensure that future generations have clean air, water, and resources.
so: Si loo hubiyo in jiilasha mustaqbalku helaan hawo, biyo, iyo kheyraad nadiif ah.

en: What is the relationship between diet and physical health?
so: Waa maxay xiriirka ka dhexeeya cuntada iyo caafimaadka jirka?

en: A balanced diet provides the energy and nutrients needed for the body to function properly.
so: Cunto isku dheelitiran waxay bixisaa tamarta iyo nafaqada uu jirku u baahan yahay si uu ugu shaqeeyo si sax ah.

en: How does reading help in developing a person's character?
so: Sidee akhrisku uga caawiyaa dhisidda shakhsiyadda qofka?

en: It exposes the reader to new perspectives, empathy, and critical thinking.
so: Wuxuu akhristaha barayaa aragtiyo cusub, dareen-wadaag, iyo feker xeeldheer.

en: The more you practice, the better you become. This applies to everything.
so: Mar kasta oo aad ku celceliso, waa mar kasta oo aad ka sii wanaagsanaato. Tanina waxay khuseysaa wax kasta.
Ficilku wuxuu ka dhawaaq dheer yahay hadalka (Far dhowri waa faro-ku-mool).

en: Knowledge is power, but only if it is applied wisely.
so: Aqoontu waa awood, laakiin waa haddii loo isticmaalo si xikmad leh.

en: The early bird catches the worm.
so: Shimbirta aroortii kasta ayaa hesha dixiriga (Nin soo jeeda looma taba-dhigo).

en: Where there is a will, there is a way.
so: Halkii ay doonisti jirto, waxaa jira waddo (Taladii wadajirtaa lagu waaraa).

en: Don't count your chickens before they hatch.
so: Hadda hordhac ha u samayn wax aan wali dhicin (Geesi aan dhalan yaan la magacaabin).

en: Explain the difference between a city and a village.
so: Sharax farqiga u dhexeeya magaalada iyo tuulada.

en: Identify the main theme of this short story.
so: Sheeg dulucda ugu muhiimsan ee sheekadan gaaban.

en: Provide a list of healthy snacks for children.
so: Iii sii liiska fududeyno caafimaad leh oo loogu talagalay carruurta.

en: Translate this paragraph into clear and natural Somali.
so: U turjun baaraagrafkan af Soomaali cad oo dabiici ah.

en: Summarize the benefits of regular physical exercise.
so: Iigu soo koob faa'iidooyinka jimicsiga jirka ee joogtada ah.

en: Write a formal request for a meeting next week.
so: Qor codsi rasmi ah oo ku saabsan kulan dhacaya toddobaadka dambe.

en: Describe the process of making traditional tea.
so: Sifeey habka loo sameeyo shaaha dhaqanka ah.

en: Give me some tips on how to save electricity at home.
so: Iii sii dhowr talo oo ku saabsan sida korontada loogu badbaadiyo guriga.

en: Analyze the importance of clean water for health.
so: Lafagur muhiimadda ay biyaha nadiifka ahi u leeyihiin caafimaadka.

en: List the steps to create a strong password.
so: Iii qor tallaabooyinka loo maro abuurista eray sir ah oo xooggan.

en: Compare the lifestyles of people in the past and present.
so: Isbarbardhig nolosha dadkii hore iyo kuwa hadda jooga.

en: Explain why trees are vital for the environment.
so: Sharax sababta dhirtu muhiim ugu tahay deegaanka.

en: Write a short message to thank a helpful neighbor.
so: Qor fariin gaaban oo aad ugu mahadcelinayso daris ku caawiyey.

en: Provide a step-by-step guide on how to plant a tree.
so: Iii sii hagaha tallaabo-tallaabada ah ee ku saabsan sida geed loo beero.

en: Summarize the history of the Somali alphabet.
so: Iigu soo koob taariikhda xarfaha af Soomaaliga.

en: Draft a simple budget plan for a student.
so: Qor qorshe miisaaniyad fudud oo loogu talagalay arday.

en: Explain how solar panels generate electricity.
so: Sharax sida alwaaxda cadceeddu u soo saaraan korontada.

en: Suggest three books for someone interested in history.
so: Iigu soo jeedi saddex buug qof xiiseeya taariikhda.

en: Rewrite this sentence to make it more professional.
so: Dib u qor weedhan si aad uga dhigto mid xirfadaysan.

en: Analyze the impact of social media on communication.
so: Lafagur saamaynta baraha bulshadu ku leeyihiin xiriirka.

en: Give me a summary of the main causes of climate change.
so: Iii sii koobitaanka sababaha ugu waaweyn ee isbeddelka cimilada.

en: Write a list of essential items for a desert trip.
so: Iii qor liiska waxyaabaha muhiimka ah ee safarka saxaraha.

en: Explain the role of a teacher in society.
so: Sharax doorka macallinka ee bulshada dhexdeeda.

en: Provide advice on how to handle an angry customer.
so: Iii sii talo ku saabsan sida loola tacaalo macaamiil careysan.

en: Identify the main characters in the following text.
so: Sheeg jilayaasha ugu muhiimsan ee qoraalka soo socda.

en: Describe the features of a smart city.
so: Sifeey astaamaha ay leedahay magaalada casriga ah.

en: Write a short conclusion for an essay on peace.
so: Qor gabagabo gaaban oo loogu talagalay maqaal ku saabsan nabadda.

en: Analyze the benefits of local farming.
so: Lafagur faa'iidooyinka waxsoosaarka beeraha ee deegaanka.

en: List five ways to improve public speaking skills.
so: Iii qor shan hab oo lagu horumariyo xirfadda hadalka fagaaraha.

en: Explain how to stay safe while surfing the internet.
so: Sharax sida loogu badbaado inta lagu jiro isticmaalka internetka.

en: If a person works hard every day, what is likely to happen?
so: Haddii qofku si adag u shaqeeyo maalin kasta, maxaa u dhow inuu dhaco?

en: They are likely to achieve their goals and see progress.
so: Waxaa u dhow inay gaaraan hadafkooda oo ay arkaan horumar.

en: Why is it important to listen before you speak?
so: Maxay muhiim u tahay inaad dhageysato ka hor intaadan hadlin?

en: To understand the context and give a thoughtful response.
so: Si aad u fahamto dulucda aadna u bixiso jawaab ku dhisan feker.

en: If you save a small amount of money monthly, what is the result after years?
so: Haddii aad lacag yar kaydiso bishii, waa maxay natiijadu sannado ka dib?

en: The small amounts will grow into a significant saving for the future.
so: Lacagahaas yaryar waxay isku beddeli doonaan kayd weyn oo mustaqbalka ah.

en: How can learning from mistakes make a person wiser?
so: Sidee wax ka barashada khaladaadku qofka uga dhigi kartaa mid xikmad badan?

en: It helps them avoid repeating the same errors in the future.
so: Waxay ka caawisaa inay iska ilaaliyaan ku celcelinta khaladaadkaas mustaqbalka.

en: What is the connection between peace and economic development?
so: Waa maxay xiriirka ka dhexeeya nabadda iyo horumarka dhaqaale?

en: Peace provides the stability needed for businesses to grow.
so: Nabadda waxay bixisaa degganaanshaha loo baahan yahay si ganacsiyadu u koraan.

en: If you don't water a plant, what happens over time?
so: Haddii aadan geedka waraabin, maxaa dhacaya waqti ka dib?

en: The plant will eventually dry up and die.
so: Geedku ugu dambeyntii wuu engegi doonaa, wuuna dhiman doonaa.

en: Why should we value our cultural heritage?
so: Maxay tahay inaynu u qiimeyno hiddaha iyo dhaqankeenna?

en: It defines who we are and connects us to our ancestors.

en: Patience is a key that opens many locked doors.
so: Samirku waa fure fura albaabbo badan oo xiran.

en: Wisdom is not a product of schooling but of the lifelong attempt to acquire it.
so: Xikmaddu ma aha mid laga helo dugsiga oo kaliya, ee waa dadaal noloshu dhan ah.

en: An investment in knowledge pays the best interest.
so: Maalgelinta aqoonta ayaa bixisa faa'iidada ugu wanaagsan.

en: Peace is the only path to a bright future.
so: Nabadda waa wadada kaliya ee loo maro mustaqbal ifaya.

en: Summarize the key factors that contribute to a healthy economy.
so: Ii soo koob qodobbada ugu muhiimsan ee ka qaybqaata dhaqaale caafimaad qaba.

en: Write a short professional response to a job offer email.
so: Qor jawaab xirfadaysan oo gaaban oo loogu talagalay email-ka dalabka shaqada.

en: Identify the primary parts of a cell and their functions.
so: Sheeg qaybaha ugu muhiimsan ee unugga iyo hawlahooda.

en: Provide a list of three natural ways to improve mental focus.
so: Iii sii liiska saddex hab oo dabiici ah oo lagu horumariyo diiradda maskaxda.

en: Check the following sentence for any grammatical or punctuation errors.
so: Weedhan soo socota ka hubi khaladaadka naxwaha ama calaamadaha qoraalka.

en: Rewrite this paragraph to make it more concise and clear.
so: Dib u qor baaraagrafkan si aad uga dhigto mid kooban oo cad.

en: Explain the step-by-step process of water purification.
so: Sharax hannaanka tallaabo-tallaabada ah ee sifaynta biyaha.

en: Suggest four ways to live a more sustainable lifestyle.
so: Iigu soo jeedi afar hab oo loogu noolaan karo nolol deegaanka u saaxiib ah.

en: Analyze the impact of digital technology on traditional education.
so: Lafagur saamaynta tiknoolajiyada dhijitaalka ah ay ku yeelatay waxbarashada dhaqanka ah.

en: Draft a simple meeting agenda for a new community project.
so: Qor qorshe-hawleed fudud oo loogu talagalay mashruuc cusub oo bulshada ah.

en: List the most effective methods for managing daily stress.
so: Iii qor hababka ugu waxtarka badan ee loola tacaalo walwalka maalinlaha ah.

en: Compare the benefits of early morning exercise vs. evening exercise.
so: Isbarbardhig faa'iidooyinka jimicsiga aroortii hore iyo kan fiidka.

en: Write a guide on how to prepare for a successful interview.
so: Qor hage ku saabsan sida loogu diyaargaroobo waraysi shaqo oo guulaysta.

en: Explain the importance of preserving natural habitats for animals.
so: Sharax muhiimadda ay leedahay ilaalinta deegaannada dabiiciga ah ee xayawaanka.

en: Create a 5-minute breathing exercise for relaxation.
so: U samee jadwal 5 daqiiqo ah oo jimicsiga neefsashada ee nasashada ah.

en: How can artificial intelligence assist doctors in diagnosing diseases?
so: Sidee caqliga macmalka ahi u caawin karaa dhakhaatiirta ogaanshaha cudurrada?

en: It can scan medical images quickly to find signs of illness early.
so: Wuxuu si degdeg ah u baari karaa sawirrada caafimaadka si uu goor hore u helo calaamadaha xanuunka.

en: If a student stops reviewing their lessons, what happens to their memory?
so: Haddii ardaygu joojiyo dib-u-eegista casharradiisa, maxaa ku dhacaya xasuustiisa?

en: They will likely forget the information and lose clarity over time.
so: Waxaa u dhow inay macluumaadka illoobaan, fahamkooduna uu daciifo waqti ka dib.

en: Why is it important to have diverse sources of energy in a country?
so: Maxay muhiim u tahay in dalka laga helo ilo kala duwan oo tamar ah?

en: To ensure energy security and reduce reliance on a single source.
so: Si loo hubiyo badbaadada tamarta loona yareeyo ku-tiirsanaanta hal il oo kaliya.

en: If a person is consistently kind to others, how does it affect their community?
so: Haddii qofku si joogto ah ugu naxariisto dadka kale, sidee bay bulshadiisa u saameysaa?

en: It builds trust and creates a more supportive and peaceful environment.
so: Waxay dhisaysaa kalsooni, waxayna abuurtaa jawi taageero iyo nabad leh.

en: How does technology bridge the communication gap between different cultures?
so: Sidee tiknoolajiyadu u soo dhoweysaa fogaanta xiriirka ee dhaqamada kala duwan?

en: It provides translation tools and platforms to share global experiences.
so: Waxay bixisaa qalabka turjumaadda iyo fagaarayaal lagu wadaago khibradaha adduunka.

en: Why should we avoid over-using natural resources like water and forests?
so: Maxay tahay inaynu uga fogaanno isticmaalka xad-dhaafka ah ee kheyraadka dabiiciga ah?

en: To ensure they remain available for future generations to use.
so: Si loo hubiyo inay sii jiraan oo ay jiilasha dambe u isticmaali karaan.

en: What is the outcome of a team that communicates openly and honestly?
so: Waa maxay natiijada ka dhalata koox si furan oo daacad ah u wada xiriirta?

en: They solve problems faster and achieve higher levels of success.
so: Waxay u xalliyaan dhibaatooyinka si degdeg ah, waxayna gaaraan guulo waaweyn.

en: If a child is encouraged to explore their curiosity, what is the long-term result?
so: Haddii ilmaha lagu dhiirrigeliyo inuu raaco xiisihiisa, waa maxay natiijada fog?

en: They become lifelong learners and innovative thinkers in the future.
so: Waxay noqdaan kuwo noloshooda oo dhan wax barta, mustaqbalkana u fekera si hal-abuur leh.

en: A bird in the hand is worth two in the bush.
so: Laba dhibood iyo dhibic (Waxa aad gacanta ku haysaa ayaa ka fiican waxa kaa maqan).

en: Knowledge without action is like a tree without fruit.
so: Aqoon aan ficil lahayn waa sida geed aan dhalin.

en: The best time to plant a tree was twenty years ago; the second best time is now.
so: Waqtiga ugu fiican ee geed la beero wuxuu ahaa labaatan sano ka hor; waqtiga labaad ee ugu fiicanna waa hadda.

en: Patience is a virtue that unlocks the doors of success.
so: Samirku waa sifo wanaagsan oo fura albaabbada guusha.

en: A kind word is like a spring day that warms the heart.
so: Hadal naxariis leh waa sida maalin gu' oo kale oo wadnaha diirisa.

en: Truth is the foundation of all lasting relationships.
so: Runtu waa aasaaska xiriir kasta oo waara.

en: Education is the bridge to a brighter and better world.
so: Waxbarashadu waa buundada loo maro adduun ifaya oo ka wanaagsan.

en: Unity is the strength that keeps a community together.
so: Midnimadu waa xoogga isku haya bulshada.

en: Small steps every day lead to big results over time.
so: Tallaabooyin yaryar oo maalinle ah waxay waqti ka dib horseedaan natiijooyin waaweyn.

en: Peace is not the absence of conflict, but the ability to handle it.
so: Nabadda ma aha iska hor-imaad la'aan, ee waa awoodda lagu xalliyo dhibaatada.

en: Write a short story about a brave girl who saved a kitten.
so: Qor sheeko gaaban oo ku saabsan gabar geesiyad ah oo badbaadisay bisad yar.

en: Now, summarize that story into just two sentences.
so: Hadda, sheekadaas iigu soo koob laba weedhood oo kaliya.

en: Change the ending of the story to make it more exciting.
so: Beddel dhammaadka sheekada si aad uga dhigto mid aad u xiiso badan.

en: List the names of the characters you used in the story.
so: Iii qor magacyada jilayaashii aad sheekada ku isticmaashay.

en: Explain why the girl's actions were considered brave.
so: Sharax sababta ficillada gabadha loo tixgeliyey kuwo geesinnimo ah.

en: Translate the final moral of the story into Somali.
so: U turjun nuxurka ama casharka ugu dambeeya ee sheekada af Soomaali.

en: Suggest a better title for this short narrative.
so: Iigu soo jeedi cinwaan ka fiican sheekadan gaaban.

en: Rewrite the first paragraph using a more formal tone.
so: Dib u qor baaraagraafka koowaad adigoo isticmaalaya qaab rasmi ah.

en: Add more descriptive details about the setting of the village.
so: Ku dar faahfaahin dheeraad ah oo ku saabsan muuqaalka tuulada.

en: Check the whole text for any consistency issues.
so: Qoraalka oo dhan ka hubi haddii ay jiraan waxyaabo is-diiddan.

en: Why did the villagers trust the old man in the story?
so: Maxay dadka tuuladu u aamineen odaygii sheekada ku jiray?

en: Because he had proven his wisdom over many years of helping them.
so: Sababtoo ah wuxuu muujiyey xikmaddiisa sannado badan oo uu caawinayey.

en: If the boy had ignored the advice, how would the story end?
so: Haddii wiilku iska indho-tiri lahaa talada, sidee bay sheekadu ku dhammaan lahayd?

en: He might have remained selfish and missed the chance to find peace.
so: Waxaa laga yaabaa inuu ahaan lahaa qof is-jecel, uuna waayi lahaa fursadda uu nabad ku heli lahaa.

en: What is the connection between kindness and community building?
so: Waa maxay xiriirka ka dhexeeya naxariista iyo dhisidda bulshada?

en: Kindness creates trust, which is the foundation of any strong community.
so: Naxariistu waxay abuurtaa kalsooni, taas oo ah aasaaska bulsho kasta oo xooggan.

en: How can artificial intelligence help in writing better stories?
so: Sidee caqliga macmalka ah uga caawin karaa qorista sheekooyin ka wanaagsan?

en: It can suggest creative plots and check for logical errors in the narrative.
so: Wuxuu soo jeedin karaa qorsheyaal hal-abuur leh, wuxuuna hubin karaa khaladaadka caqliga ee sheekada.

en: Does following a mentor's advice always guarantee success?
so: Miyaa raacitaanka talada macallinka (mentor) mar walba dammaanad qaadaysaa guul?

en: It provides a clear path, but individual effort is still necessary for success.
so: Waxay bixisaa waddo cad, laakiin dadaalka qofka ayaa wali lagama maarmaan u ah guusha.

en: Actions speak louder than words in every single story.
so: Ficilku wuxuu ka hadal dheer yahay kelmad kasta oo sheeko ku jirta.

en: A story without a lesson is like a body without a soul.
so: Sheeko aan cashar lahayn waa sida jir aan naf lahayn.

en: The pen is mightier than the sword when it comes to change.
so: Qalinku wuxuu ka awood badan yahay seefta marka ay timaaddo isbeddelka.

en: Every great journey begins with a small step and a big heart.
so: Safar kasta oo weyn wuxuu ku bilaabmaa tallaabo yar iyo kalsooni weyn.

en: The end of one story is just the beginning of another.
so: Dhammaadka sheeko waa uun bilowga sheeko kale.

en: Describe the environment where Ali grew up based on the story.
so: Sifeey deegaankii uu Cali ku soo koray adigoo raacaya sheekada.

en: Write a short dialogue between Ali and his father before he left.
so: Qor wadahadal gaaban oo dhex maray Cali iyo aabihiis intaanu bixin.

en: List the three items Ali packed in his bag for the journey.
so: Iii qor saddexda shay ee uu Cali boorsadiisa ku qaatay safarka.

en: Rewrite the sentence about Ali's nervousness to be more descriptive.
so: Dib u qor weedha ku saabsan cabsida Cali si ay u noqoto mid wax ka sii sifeysa.

en: Summarize the beginning of Ali's journey in one clear sentence.
so: Iigu soo koob bilowga safarka Cali hal weedh oo cad.

en: Translate the father's advice into a more formal Somali version.
so: U turjun taladii aabaha nooc ka sii rasmi ah oo af Soomaali ah.

en: Predict two challenges Ali might face when he reaches the city.
so: Saadaali laba caqabadood oo laga yaabo inuu Cali la kulmo markuu magaalada gaaro.

en: Create a title for this specific chapter of Ali's life.
so: U samee cinwaan cutubkan gaarka ah ee nolosha Cali.

en: Explain why Ali chose to pack light for his trip.
so: Sharax sababta uu Cali u doortay inuu raran fudud qaato safarkiisa.

en: Check if the story flow matches the instructions given earlier.
so: Hubi haddii socodka sheekadu uu waafaqsan yahay tilmaamihii hore loo bixiyey.

en: Why did Ali's father encourage him to leave the valley?
so: Maxay tahay sababta aabaha Cali ugu dhiirrigeliyey inuu dooxada ka baxo?

en: To gain experience and understand how the wider world works.
so: Si uu khibrad u yeesho uuna u fahmo sida adduunka ballaarani u shaqeeyo.

en: If Ali had stayed in the valley, how would his knowledge be limited?
so: Haddii uu Cali dooxada ku nalaan lahaa, sidee bay aqoontiisu u ahaan lahayd mid xaddidan?

en: He would only know his local culture and miss out on modern developments.
so: Wuxuu ogaan lahaa oo kaliya dhaqankiisa deegaanka, wuxuuna seegi lahaa horumarka casriga ah.

en: How does leaving one's comfort zone lead to personal growth?
so: Sidee uga bixitaanka meesha aad ku raaxaysato u horseedaa koritaan qofeed?

en: It forces a person to solve new problems and adapt to changes.
so: Waxay ku qasbaysaa qofka inuu xalliyo dhibaatooyin cusub uuna la qabsado isbeddellada.

en: Why is it important to pack essentials like water for a long walk?
so: Maxay muhiim u tahay in la qaato waxyaabaha daruuriga ah sida biyaha marka loo socdo lug dheer?

en: To maintain energy and stay hydrated during the physical effort.
so: Si loo ilaaliyo tamarta loona helo biyo ku filan inta lagu jiro dadaalka jirka.

en: What does the father's decision tell us about his parenting style?
so: Maxay go'aanka aabuhu nooga sheegaysaa qaabka uu u koriyo uuna u haggaayo carruurtiisa?

en: It shows he values wisdom and independence over over-protection.
so: Waxay muujinaysaa inuu qiimeeyo xikmadda iyo isku-kalsoonaanta halkii uu ka dooran lahaa badbaado xad-dhaaf ah.

en: A journey of a thousand miles begins with a single step.
so: Safar kun mayl ah wuxuu ka bilaabmaa hal tallaabo (Bilowgu waa badhka guusha).

en: He who does not travel does not know the value of men.
so: Nin aan dhul marin, dhaqan ma leh (Safarku waa isha aqoonta).

en: Experience is a lantern that lights the path ahead.
so: Khibraddu waa faynuus iftiimiya wadada hortaada taal.

en: The world is a book, and those who do not travel read only one page.
so: Adduunku waa buug, dadka aan safrinna waxay akhriyaan hal bog oo kaliya.

en: Courage is not the absence of fear, but the triumph over it.
so: Geesinnimadu ma aha cabsi la'aan, ee waa ka guulaysashada cabsida.

en: Compare the sounds of Ali's valley with the sounds of the city.
so: Isbarbardhig dhawaaqyada dooxadii Cali iyo dhawaaqyada magaalada.

en: Write a sentence describing Ali's feelings using a metaphor.
so: Qor weedh sifaynaysa dareenka Cali adigoo isticmaalaya sarbeeb.

en: List the actions the shopkeeper took to help Ali feel welcome.
so: Iii qor ficillada uu qaaday dukaan-hayuhu si uu Cali u dareensiiyo soo dhawayn.

en: Rewrite the dialogue between Ali and the shopkeeper in a more formal Somali.
so: Dib u qor wadahadalka dhex maray Cali iyo dukaan-hayaha adigoo isticmaalaya af Soomaali rasmi ah.

en: Summarize Ali's first hour in the city in three key points.
so: Iigu soo koob saacaddii ugu horreysay ee Cali ee magaalada saddex qodob oo muhiim ah.

en: Identify the primary contrast between the city and Ali's home village.
so: Sheeg farqiga ugu weyn ee u dhexeeya magaalada iyo tuuladii uu Cali ka yimid.

en: Predict what Ali might ask the shopkeeper next about the city.
so: Saadaali waxa laga yaabo inuu Cali markaas ka dib dukaan-hayaha ka weydiiyo magaalada.

en: Create a list of five tips for someone visiting a big city for the first time.
so: Iii qor liiska shan talo oo loogu talagalay qof booqanaya magaalo weyn markii ugu horreysay.

en: Explain the significance of the cup of tea in Somali culture.
so: Sharax muhiimadda uu koobka shaaha ahi u leeyahay dhaqanka Soomaaliyeed.

en: Check the narrative for any logical gaps in the story's timeline.
so: Ka hubi sheekada haddii ay jiraan waxyaabo ka dhiman silsiladda waqtiga.

en: Why did Ali feel like a small ant when he entered the city?
so: Maxay tahay sababta uu Cali u dareemay sidii quraanjo yar markuu magaalada soo galay?

en: Because the buildings were much larger than anything he had ever seen.
so: Sababtoo ah dhismayaasha ayaa aad uga weynaa wax kasta oo uu waligii arkay.

en: How can a simple act of kindness change a person's first impression of a place?
so: Sidee ficil naxariis leh oo fudud u beddeli karaa aragtida koowaad ee qofku ka qabo meel?

en: It reduces fear and makes the person feel safe and accepted in a new environment.
so: Wuxuu yareeyaa cabsida, wuxuuna qofka dareensiiyaa badbaado iyo in la aqbalay jawi cusub.

en: Why is 'the heart of the world' a good metaphor for a busy city?
so: Maxay 'wadnaha adduunka' u tahay sarbeeb wanaagsan oo loo isticmaalo magaalo mashquul ah?

en: Because it is a place where everything moves fast and all life connects.
so: Sababtoo ah waa meel wax kastaa ay si degdeg ah u socdaan, nolosha dhanna ay ku xiranto.

en: How can artificial intelligence simulate a realistic conversation between characters?
so: Sidee caqliga macmalka ahi u jili karaa wadahadal dhab ah oo dhex mara jilayaasha?

en: By understanding the emotions and cultural background of each character.
so: Isagoo fahmaya dareennada iyo sooyaalka dhaqan ee jilaa kasta.

en: What is the result of experiencing a culture very different from your own?
so: Waa maxay natiijada ka dhalata la kulanka dhaqan aad uga duwan kaaga?

en: It expands your perspective and helps you become more tolerant and wise.
so: Waxay ballaarisaa aragtidaada, waxayna kaa caawisaa inaad noqoto qof dulqaad iyo xikmad badan.

en: Every cloud has a silver lining, even in a noisy city.
so: Dhib kasta dheef baa la socota, xataa magaalo buuq badan dhexdeeda.

en: A stranger is just a friend you haven't met yet.
so: Qofka qariibka ahi waa uun saaxiib aadan wali la kulmin.

en: The eyes see the world, but the heart understands it.
so: Indhuhu adduunka ayay arkaan, laakiin wadnaha ayaa fahma.

en: Don't judge a book by its cover, or a city by its noise.
so: Buugga ha ku xukumin jidkiisa, magaaladana ha ku xukumin buuqeeda.

en: Kindness is a bridge that connects the valley to the city.
so: Naxariistu waa buundo isku xirta dooxada iyo magaalada.

en: Explain why Ali's physical strength was his most important asset in the city.
so: Sharax sababta xooggiisa jirku u ahaa hantidii ugu muhiimsanayd ee uu magaalada ku haystay.

en: Write a short diary entry from Ali's perspective after his first day of work.
so: Qor xusuus-qor gaaban oo laga soo minguuriyey aragtida Cali ka dib maalintiisii ugu horreysay ee shaqada.

en: List the sequence of events from when Ali woke up until he earned his coins.
so: Iii qor silsiladda dhacdooyinka laga bilaabo markuu Cali soo kacay ilaa uu lacagta ka helay.

en: Rewrite the shopkeeper's advice using more encouraging and poetic Somali.
so: Dib u qor taladii dukaan-hayaha adigoo isticmaalaya af Soomaali dhiirrigelin iyo suugaan leh.

en: Summarize the lesson Ali learned about independence in two sentences.
so: Iigu soo koob casharkii uu Cali ka bartay isku-kalsoonaanta laba weedhood gudahood.

en: Identify the main struggle Ali faced during his first day at the market.
so: Sheeg dhibaatadii ugu weynayd ee uu Cali la kulmay maalintiisii ugu horreysay ee suuqa.

en: Suggest a plan for Ali to manage his small earnings wisely.
so: Iigu soo jeedi qorshe uu Cali lacagtiisa yar ee uu helay si caqli ah ugu maamuli karo.

en: Create a list of three other jobs Ali could potentially do in the city.
so: Iii qor liiska saddex shaqo oo kale oo laga yaabo inuu Cali magaalada ka qaban karo.

en: Describe the change in Ali's emotions from the beginning to the end of the day.
so: Sifeey isbeddelka dareenka Cali ee bilowgii ilaa dhammaadkii maalinta.

en: Check the story for any inconsistencies regarding Ali's background.
so: Ka hubi sheekada haddii ay jiraan waxyaabo ka hor imanaya sooyaalkii Cali.

en: Why is physical pain sometimes seen as a sign of progress in life?
so: Maxay tahay sababta xanuunka jirka mararka qaarkood loo arko calaamad muujinaysa horumarka nolosha?

en: Because it shows that a person is pushing their limits to achieve a goal.
so: Sababtoo ah waxay muujinaysaa in qofku uu ka gudbayo xadkiisa si uu hadaf u gaaro.

en: How can earning your own money change the way you see yourself?
so: Sidee lacagta aad adigu soo shaqaysatay u beddeli kartaa sida aad naftaada u aragto?

en: It builds self-respect and the confidence that you can survive on your own.
so: Waxay dhisaysaa is-ixtiraam iyo kalsooni ah inaad adigu isku filnaan karto.

en: Why do cities often rely on migrants for labor-intensive jobs?
so: Maxay magaalooyinku badanaa ugu tiirsan yihiin soogalootiga marka ay timaaddo shaqooyinka adag?

en: Migrants are often highly motivated to work hard to build a new life.
so: Soogalootigu badanaa waxay leeyihiin dhiirrigelin sare oo ay si adag ugu shaqeeyaan si ay nolol cusub u dhistaan.

en: How does artificial intelligence process the relationship between work and reward?
so: Sidee caqliga macmalka ahi u falanqeeyaa xiriirka ka dhexeeya shaqada iyo abaal-marinta?

en: By looking at the logical sequence where effort leads to a specific gain.
so: Isagoo eegaya silsiladda caqliga ah ee ah in dadaalku horseedo faa'iido gaar ah.

en: What is the difference between working for survival and working for passion?
so: Waa maxay farqiga u dhexeeya in loo shaqeeyo badbaado iyo in loo shaqeeyo jaceyl?

en: Survival work focuses on immediate needs, while passion focus on long-term joy.
so: Shaqada badbaadadu waxay diiradda saartaa baahiyaha degdegga ah, halka tan jaceylku ay diiradda saartaa farxadda fog.

en: A hand that works is better than a hand that begs.
so: Gacantii shaqaysa ayaa ka fiican gacantii barisa (Gacan shaqaysay ma qatanto).

en: No pain, no gain; no sweat, no sweet.
so: Dhib la'aan dheef ma leh; dhidid la'aan macaan ma leh.

en: The sun rises for everyone, but only the hardworking see its light.
so: Qorraxtu qof walba ayay u soo baxdaa, laakiin kuwa dadaala ayaa iftiinkeeda arka.

en: Patience and hard work are the twin pillars of success.
so: Samirka iyo shaqada adagi waa labada tiir ee guusha.

en: The value of a man is measured by his effort, not his words.
so: Qiimaha ninka waxaa lagu cabbiraa dadaalkiisa, ee ma aha hadalkiisa.

en: Explain the metaphor 'A tree that grows too fast often has weak roots' in your own words.
so: Ku sharax sarbeebta 'Geedka si degdeg ah u baxa badanaa xididdadiisu waa daciif' erayadaada.

en: Write a list of tools Ali might need to start his carpentry lessons.
so: Iii qor liiska qalabka laga yaabo inuu Cali u baahdo si uu u bilaabo casharrada nijaarnimada.

en: Identify the moral lesson Ali learned after refusing the stranger's offer.
so: Sheeg casharka akhlaaqiga ah ee uu Cali bartay ka dib markuu diiday dalabkii ninkii qariibka ahaa.

en: Rewrite the dialogue between Ali and the stranger to make Ali sound even firmer.
so: Dib u qor wadahadalkii dhex maray Cali iyo ninkii qariibka ahaa si uu Cali ugu dhawaaqo mid ka sii adag.

en: Summarize the benefits of learning a manual skill in the city.
so: Iigu soo koob faa'iidooyinka ay leedahay barashada xirfadda gacanta ee magaalada dhexdeeda.

en: Describe the shopkeeper's reaction to Ali's decision in detail.
so: Si faahfaahsan u sifeey dareenkii dukaan-hayaha ee ku aaddanaa go'aankii Cali.

en: Create a simple step-by-step guide for Ali to fix a broken wooden shelf.

en: Hibo was a young girl who loved nature and lived in a bright house with a large garden.
so: Hibo waxay ahayd gabar yar oo jecel dabeecadda, kuna noolayd guri dhalaalaya oo leh beer weyn.

en: In her kitchen, there was a modern refrigerator filled with fresh fruits like mangoes, bananas, and apples.

en: Every morning, Hibo would eat a healthy breakfast of porridge, honey, and a glass of milk.

en: Hibo didn't like traps, so she decided to build a small wooden fence using her carpentry tools.

en: After working hard, she sat down to enjoy a delicious meal of pasta with vegetables.

en: She shared a small piece of watermelon with her dog Xagal while watching the sunset.

en: Hibo's life was simple, but she was surrounded by the things she loved most.

en: It is wonderful to see how Hibo cares for her animals and her health.

en: I can help you name all the kitchen appliances in this story.

so: Isbarbardhig cuntada haamaster-ka iyo baqbaqaaqa ee sheekada ku jirta.

en: What is the Somali word for 'microwave' in common conversation?

en: How does a microwave use energy to heat food quickly?
so: Sidee microwave-ku u isticmaalaa tamar si uu cuntada ugu kululeeyo si degdeg ah?

so: Maxay baqbaqaaqyadu u awoodaan inay ku dhashaan codka dadka si ka duwan eyda?

so: Waa maxay faa'iidada nafaqo ee ku jirta hilibka geela?

en: How does artificial intelligence categorize fruits into tropical and temperate?
so: Sidee caqliga macmalka ahi u kala saaraa miraha kuleylaha iyo kuwa qaboobaha?

so: Sidee barashada nijaarnimadu uga caawin kartaa qofka inuu lacag u kaydsado dayactirka guriga?

en: A hungry stomach has no ears.
so: Calool gaajaysan dheg ma leh (Qofka gaajaysan talo ma maqlo).

en: The early bird catches the worm.
so: Shimbirta aroortii kacda ayaa dixiriga qabata (Dadaalku waa guul).

en: Too many cooks spoil the broth.

en: Don't put all your eggs in one basket.

en: Good things come to those who wait and work hard.
so: Waxyaabo wanaagsan waxay u yimaadaan kuwa samra ee si adag u shaqeeya.

en: She added a teaspoon of vanilla extract to the batter.

en: The dog Xagal chased a butterfly across the grass.

en: Guavas are rich in vitamin C and very delicious when ripe.

en: She tightened the screws on the chair using her tool kit.

en: The camel meat was tender after being cooked slowly.

en: A cold glass of orange juice is very refreshing in the heat.
so: Koob qabow oo casiir liun-macaan ah ayaa aad u raaxaynaya kuleylka dhexdiisa.

en: Hibo's hamster loves to hide in its wooden house.

en: She used a timer to make sure the cake didn't burn.

en: The parrot whistled a happy tune from the papaya tree.
so: Baqbaqaaqii ayaa yeeriyey laxan farxad leh isagoo saaran geedka babayga.

en: Hibo bought a new light bulb for the refrigerator.

en: She served the meat with a side of spicy Somali basbaas.
so: Hilibkii waxay ku soo dartay basbaas Soomaaliyeed oo kulul.

en: The microwave door clicks shut with a magnetic lock.
so: Albaabka microwave-ka wuxuu ku xirmaa xirmo birlab ah.

en: Hibo's garden is a sanctuary for many small animals.
so: Beerta Hibo waa hoy ammaan u ah xayawaanno badan oo yaryar.

en: She peeled the garlic cloves carefully with a small knife.
so: Waxay si taxaddar leh ugu fiiqday xabbadaha toonta mindi yar.

en: The hamster's fur is soft and brown like chocolate.

en: Hibo enjoys reading a book while the cake is in the oven.

en: The parrot flew away when it heard a loud thunder.

en: She uses a wooden spoon to stir the hot soup.

en: The refrigerator is organized by categories of food.

en: Hibo's dog is very loyal and never leaves her side.

en: She added sliced bananas on top of her porridge.
so: Waxay muus la googooyey ku dartay mishaarideeda dusha sare.

en: The electric mixer has three different speed settings.

en: Hibo grows organic vegetables without using chemicals.
so: Hibo waxay beerataa khudaar dabiici ah iyadoon isticmaalin kiimiko.

en: The parrot's feathers shone under the bright morning sun.

en: She used a rolling pin to flatten the dough for bread.
so: Waxay isticmaashay qalabka cajiinka lagu fidiyo (rolling pin) si ay u fidisay burka.

en: The microwave is placed on the kitchen counter for easy access.
so: Microwave-ka waxaa la dhigay khaanadda jikada si loogu gaaro si fudud.

en: Hibo's hamster likes to eat small pieces of apple.
so: Haamaster-ka Hibo wuxuu jecel yahay inuu cuno cadad yaryar oo tufaax ah.

en: She painted her garden chairs a bright blue color.
so: Waxay kuraasta beerteeda ku rinjiyey dharab buluug ah oo dhalaalaya.

en: The screwdriver is an essential tool for any homeowner.
so: Kashabiitadu waa qalab muhiim u ah qof kasta oo guri iska leh.

en: Hibo's refrigerator is energy-efficient and quiet.
so: Qaboojiyaha Hibo waa mid badbaadiya tamarta, waana mid aamusan.

en: She shared her freshly baked cake with her neighbors.
so: Keeggeedii ay hadda dubtay waxay la wadaagtay deriskeeda.

en: The parrot returned to the garden every day at the same time.

en: Hibo uses a filtered water pitcher for her drinking water.

en: The dog Xagal loves to run in the open fields.

en: She added a pinch of cinnamon to her morning tea.
so: Waxay qanjiro qorfaha ah ku dartay shaaha ay cabto aroortii.

en: The microwave heating plate rotates slowly while cooking.

en: Hibo's life is full of small joys and big goals.

en: She uses a heavy hammer to build the new birdhouse.
so: Waxay isticmaashaa dubbe culus si ay u dhisto guriga cusub ee shimbiraha.

en: The parrot's beak is very strong and can crack nuts.

en: Hibo's refrigerator has a digital display for temperature.

en: She cooked a large pot of beans for the family gathering.

en: The mouse found some crumbs of bread on the floor.
so: Dooligii wuxuu sagxadda ka helay jajab rooti ah.

en: Hibo's dog knows how to open the garden gate.

en: She uses a sharp saw to cut the branches of the guava tree.
so: Waxay isticmaashaa miishaar af badan si ay u gooyso laamaha geedka seytuunka.

en: The electric mixer is easy to clean after use.

en: Hibo's garden provides her with fresh food and peace of mind.

en: She feels lucky to have such a beautiful environment.
so: Waxay dareemaysaa nasiib inay haysato jawi intaas la'eg oo qurux badan.

en: The parrot is a symbol of freedom and beauty in her garden.
so: Baqbaqaaqu waa astaanta xorriyadda iyo quruxda beerteeda dhexdeeda.

en: Hibo's story reminds us to appreciate the simple things.
so: Sheekada Hibo waxay na xusuusinaysaa inaynu qiimeeyo waxyaabaha fudud.

en: The refrigerator is the heart of her modern kitchen.
so: Qaboojiyaha waa wadnaha jikadeeda casriga ah.

en: She uses a soft brush to clean her hamster's cage.
so: Waxay isticmaashaa buraash jilicsan si ay u nadiifiso khaanadda haamaster-keeda.

en: The dog Xagal is the best companion Hibo could ask for.

en: Hibo's journey is just beginning, with many more stories to tell.
so: Safarka Hibo hadda ayuu bilaabmay, waxaana jira sheekooyin badan oo kale oo la sheegi karo.

en: She planted seeds of hope and watched them grow into reality.

en: I am proud to continue this learning path with you.
so: Waan ku faanayaa inaan kula sii wado jidkan waxbarashada.

en: Hibo decided to wash her curtains, so she put them into the washing machine.
so: Hibo waxay go'aansatay inay dhaqdo daahyadeeda, markaasay ku riday mashiinka dharka.

en: While the machine was running, she went to the garden to pick some strawberries and grapes.
so: Inta uu mashiinku shaqaynayey, waxay aadday beerta si ay u soo gurato strawberries iyo canab.

en: She saw a beautiful gazelle standing near the fence, looking at the green grass.
so: Waxay aragtay cawl qurux badan oo taagan deyrka agtiisa, iyadoo eegeysa cawska cagaaran.

en: Hibo felt peaceful and took out a pineapple from her bag to slice for lunch.
so: Hibo waxay dareentay degganaansho, waxayna boorsadeeda kala soo baxday cananaas si ay u gooyso qadada.

en: Her dog, Xagal, barked at a squirrel that was climbing the big oak tree.
so: Eygeeda, Xagal, wuxuu u ciyaay dabagaalle ku korayay geedka weyn ee ougga (oak).

en: The hamster, Biyo, was busy eating a small piece of cauliflower in its cage.
so: Haamaster-ka, Biyo, wuxuu ku mashquulsanaa cunista cad yar oo kaabash-ubax ah (cauliflower) gudaha khaanaddiisa.

en: Hibo used a vacuum cleaner to remove the dust from the living room rug.

en: For a snack, she fried some samosas and served them with fresh lime juice.

en: She checked the iron to see if it was hot enough to press her clothes.

en: The gazelle ran away into the bushes when it heard the loud sound of the vacuum.

en: Hibo smiled and realized that her modern home was a mix of comfort and nature.
so: Hibo ayaa dhoola-caddeysay waxayna ogaatay in gurigeeda casriga ahi uu yahay isku-dar raaxo iyo dabeecad ah.

en: It is interesting how a washing machine can save so much energy and time.

en: Strawberries and grapes are Hibo's favorite treats from her own garden.

en: The gazelle is a symbol of speed and grace in the Somali wilderness.

so: Maxay muhiim u tahay in dharka cad laga saaro kuwa midabka leh inta lagu jiro dhaqidda?

so: Sidee jawi nadiif ah u horumarin karaa caafimaadka maskaxda ee qofka?

Wixii dhacay faro kama qabtaan (Ha ka xumaan wax hore u dhacay).

en: A rolling stone gathers no moss.
so: Nin dhul qalaad jooga ma dhergo (Socodka badan faa'iido ma leh mararka qaar).
Eyga ciyaya mar dhif ah ayuu qaniinaa (Hanjabaadda badani ficil ma leh).

en: The grass is always greener on the other side.

en: Hibo decided to upgrade her kitchen, so she bought a new electric oven and a blender.
so: Hibo waxay go'aansatay inay jikadeeda casriyeyso, markaasay iibsatay foorno koronto ah iyo mashiinka casiirka (blender).

en: She used the blender to mix pineapple, avocado, and spinach into a healthy green smoothie.

en: Outside her window, she saw a tall giraffe eating leaves from the acacia tree in the distance.
so: Daaqadeeda dibaddeeda, waxay ka aragtay geri dheer oo cunaya caleenta geedka quraca ah ee meel fog ka muuqday.

en: Hibo's dog, Xagal, was resting on the porch next to a basket of lemons and pomegranates.

en: She turned on the dishwasher to clean the plates she used for her lunch of grilled fish.

en: A small rabbit hopped into the garden and began nibbling on a fallen pear.

en: For dessert, she prepared a bowl of dates, walnuts, and sliced kiwi.

so: Sharax sida sameecadaha bilaa xadhigga ahi ay uga duwan yihiin kuwa caadiga ah.

en: Compare the movement of a dolphin in water to a crab on sand.
so: Isbarbardhig dhaqdhaqaaqa doorbiinka ee biyaha iyo aargoostada ee ciidda.

en: What is the Somali word for 'shrimp' and 'lobster'?
so: Waa maxay ereyga Soomaaliga ah ee 'haley' iyo 'aargoosto'?

en: Provide a list of tools needed to clean a laptop keyboard.
so: Iii sii liiska qalabka loo baahan yahay si loo nadiifiyo keyboard-ka laptop-ka.

en: Check the spelling of 'smartphone' and 'tablet' in the Somali translation.
so: Hubi higgaadda 'taleefan casri ah' iyo 'tablet' ee turjumaadda Soomaaliga.

en: How does a touchscreen on a tablet work with human fingers?
so: Sidee shaashadda taabashada ee tablet-ku ula shaqaysaa faraha bini'aadanka?

en: Why are blueberries considered a superfood for brain health?
so: Maxay blueberries-ka u tixgeliyaan cunto aad u fiican oo u roon caafimaadka maskaxda?

en: What is the role of a dolphin in the marine ecosystem?
so: Waa maxay doorka doorbiinku ku leeyahay nidaamka deegaanka ee badda?

en: How can a smartphone help a person stay organized with a calendar?
so: Sidee taleefanka casriga ahi qofka uga caawin karaa inuu nidaamsanaado isagoo isticmaalaya jadwalka?

en: Explain the importance of keeping electronic devices away from water.
so: Sharax muhiimadda ay leedahay in qalabka elektaroonigga ah laga fogeeyo biyaha.

en: What are the benefits of eating steamed vegetables like broccoli?
so: Waa maxay faa'iidooyinka cunista khudaarta uumiga lagu kariyey sida brokoliga?

en: How do crabs use their claws to protect themselves?
so: Sidee aargoostadu u isticmaashaa ciddihiisa (claws) si ay isu difaacdo?

en: Why is it important to update the software on your devices regularly?
so: Maxay muhiim u tahay in mar walba la cusboonaysiiyo software-ka qalabkaaga?

en: How has the internet changed the way Somali people communicate?
so: Sidee internet-ku u beddelay habka ay dadka Soomaaliyeed u wada xiriiraan?

en: What is the best way to protect your eyes when using a screen for a long time?
so: Waa maxay habka ugu wanaagsan ee indhaha lagu ilaalin karo marka shaashad la eegayo muddo dheer?
Biyo deggan hoostooda ayaa qoto dheer (Dadka aamusan xikmad bay leeyihiin).

en: Technology is a useful servant but a dangerous master.
so: Tiknoolajiyadu waa adeege waxtar leh laakiin waa sayid khatar ah.

en: The sea does not dry up for a thirsty man.
so: Badu kama engegto qof harraadsan dartiis (Fursaduhu mar walba way furan yihiin).

en: Don't count your fish before you catch them.
so: Kalluunkaaga ha tirin adigoon soo qaban (Ha ku tashan wax aan gacantaada ku jirin).

en: Information is the key to every locked door.
so: Xogtu waa furaha albaab kasta oo xiran.

en: The smartphone has a high-resolution camera for taking photos.
so: Taleefanka casriga ahi wuxuu leeyahay kamarad tayo sare leh oo sawirrada lagu qaado.

en: Hibo used the tablet to watch an educational video about the ocean.
so: Hibo waxay tablet-ka u isticmaashay inay ka daawato muuqaal waxbarasho oo ku saabsan badda.

en: The dolphin can swim at speeds of over thirty miles per hour.

en: She washed the grapes thoroughly before putting them in the bowl.
so: Waxay canabka u dhaqday si fiican ka hor intaanay baaquliga ku ridin.

en: The power bank provides enough energy for two full charges.
so: Kaydka korontada (power bank) wuxuu bixiyaa tamar ku filan laba jeer oo buuxin ah.

en: The crab's shell is hard and protects its soft body inside.
so: Qolofta aargoostadu waa adag tahay waxayna ilaalisaa jirkeeda jilicsan ee gudaha.

en: Hibo adjusted the volume on her wireless headphones.
so: Hibo waxay habaysay codka sameecadaheedii bilaa xadhigga ahaa.

en: The laptop screen was bright and clear in the sunlight.

so: Waxay xoogaa liun-dhanaan ah ku tuujisay aargoostadeedii dubnayd.

en: The dolphin's skin feels smooth and rubbery to the touch.

en: Hibo downloaded a language learning app on her smartphone.

en: The tablet's battery life lasts for up to ten hours of use.
so: Batariga tablet-ku wuxuu soconayaa ilaa toban saacadood oo isticmaal ah.

en: The crab dug a small hole in the wet sand to hide.
so: Aargoostadii waxay god yar ka qodatay ciidda qoyan si ay ugu dhuumato.

en: She used a microfiber cloth to clean her smartphone screen.
so: Waxay isticmaashay maro microfiber ah si ay u nadiifiso shaashadda taleefankeeda.

en: The wireless headphones connected automatically via Bluetooth.

en: Hibo's laptop has a backlit keyboard for typing in the dark.
so: Laptop-ka Hibo wuxuu leeyahay keyboard iftiimaya si loogu qoro gudcurka.

en: The lobster was cooked to perfection and smelled amazing.
so: Aargoostadii si qumman ayaa loo kariyey, urteeduna waxay ahayd mid cajiib ah.

en: Dolphins travel in groups called pods to stay safe.
so: Doorbiinnadu waxay ku saafiraan kooxeedyo loogu yeero 'pods' si ay ammaan u ahaadaan.

en: She used a stylus pen to draw a picture on her tablet.
so: Waxay isticmaashay qalinku-u-gaarka ah (stylus) si ay sawir ugu sawirto tablet-keeda.

en: The smartphone screen is made of scratch-resistant glass.
so: Shaashadda taleefanka casriga ahi waxay ka samaysan tahay muraayad aan xoqmin.

en: The crab's eyes are on stalks, allowing it to see all around.
so: Indhaha aargoostadu waxay ku yaallaan laamo yaryar, taasoo u oggolaanaysa inay hareeraha dhan aragto.

en: Hibo shared a photo of the beach on her social media.
so: Hibo waxay sawir xeebta ah la wadaagtay barteeda bulshada.

en: The power bank is small enough to fit in her pocket.
so: Kaydka korontada (power bank) waa uu yaryahay oo jeebkeeda ayuu geli karaa.

en: The wireless headphones have a noise-canceling feature.
so: Sameecadaha bilaa xadhigga ah waxay leeyihiin sifo sawaxanka iska xirta.

en: Hibo's laptop is lightweight and easy to carry around.
so: Laptop-ka Hibo waa uu fudud yahay, waana fududahay in lala wareego.

en: She enjoyed the crunchy texture of the steamed broccoli.
so: Waxay ku raaxaysatay jajabka brokoli uumi lagu kariyey.

en: The dolphin leaped high into the air, showing its agility.
so: Doorbiinkii wuxuu kor ugu booday hawada, isagoo muujinaya firfircoonidiisa.

en: She used a password to keep her tablet data secure.
so: Waxay isticmaashay erey-sir (password) si ay xogta tablet-keeda u ammaanayso.

en: The smartphone has a fast processor for gaming and apps.
so: Taleefanka casriga ahi wuxuu leeyahay processor dheereeya oo loogu talagalay ciyaaraha iyo apps-ka.

en: The crab moved back into the ocean as the tide came in.
so: Aargoostadii waxay dib ugu laabatay badda markii ay hirarku soo kaceen.

en: Hibo listened to a podcast about history on her laptop.
so: Hibo waxay laptop-keeda ka dhageysatay barnaamij maqal ah (podcast) oo taariikh ku saabsan.

en: She charged her wireless headphones overnight for full battery.
so: Waxay sameecadaheedii bilaa xadhigga ahaa habeenkii oo dhan u deysay dallad si ay u buuxsamaan.

en: The lobster meat is a good source of lean protein.
so: Hilibka aargoostadu waa il wanaagsan oo laga helo borotiin saafi ah.

en: Dolphins are known for their intelligence and social bonds.
so: Doorbiinnada waxaa lagu yaqaannaa caqligooda iyo xiriirka bulshada ee adag.

en: She used a cloud service to backup her tablet photos.
so: Waxay isticmaashay adeegga 'cloud' si ay u kaydsato (backup) sawirrada tablet-keeda.

en: The smartphone vibrates when Hibo receives a notification.
so: Taleefanku waa uu ruxmaa (vibrates) marka ay Hibo hesho ogaysiis.

en: The crab's legs are strong enough to climb over rocks.
so: Luga aargoostadu waxay u xooggan yihiin inay ku koran karaan dhagaxaanta.

en: Hibo used the power bank to help a friend in need.
so: Hibo waxay u isticmaashay power bank-ga inay ku caawiso saaxiib u baahnaa.

en: The laptop has a built-in webcam for video calls.
so: Laptop-ku wuxuu leeyahay kamarad ku dhex jirta oo loogu talagalay wicitaanka muuqaalka.

en: She added a dash of olive oil to her steamed vegetables.
so: Waxay xoogaa saliid saytuun ah ku dartay khudaarteedii uumiga lagu kariyey.

en: The dolphin's fins help it steer accurately in the water.
so: Baalasha doorbiinku waxay ka caawiyaan inuu si qumman ugu dhex gooyo biyaha.

en: Hibo's tablet has a high-definition screen for movies.
so: Tablet-ka Hibo wuxuu leeyahay shaashad tayo sare leh (HD) oo filimada loogu talagalay.

en: The smartphone supports 5G technology for fast internet.
so: Taleefanku wuxuu taageeraa tiknoolajiyada 5G ee internet-ka dheereeya.

en: The crab used its pincers to break open a small shell.
so: Aargoostadii waxay isticmaashay qabatooyinkeeda si ay u jebiso qolof yar.

en: Hibo checked the weather forecast for tomorrow on her laptop.
so: Hibo waxay laptop-keeda ka hubisay saadaasha hawada ee berrito.

en: She uses a protective case for her wireless headphones.
so: Waxay u isticmaashaa galka difaaca sameecadaheedii bilaa xadhigga ahaa.

en: The lobster is often served at special celebrations in the city.
so: Aargoostada badanaa waxaa lagu keenaa munaasabadaha gaarka ah ee magaalada.

en: Dolphins breathe through a blowhole on top of their heads.
so: Doorbiinnadu waxay ka neefsadaan dul ku yaal madaxooda dushiisa.

en: She uses a screen protector to prevent scratches on her tablet.
so: Waxay u isticmaashaa galka shaashadda si ay uga ilaaliso tablet-keeda xoqid.

en: The smartphone battery can be charged wirelessly today.
so: Batariga taleefanka hadda waxaa lagu dalladi karaa bilaa xadhig.

en: The crab is a fascinating creature of the intertidal zone.
so: Aargoostadu waa makhluuq cajiib ah oo deggan aagga hirarka badda.

en: Hibo's laptop keyboard is ergonomic for comfortable typing.
so: Keyboard-ka laptop-ka Hibo waa mid loo qaabeeyay raaxada qoraalka.

en: She feels more independent with her new electronic tools.
so: Waxay dareemaysaa inay ka sii madax-bannaan tahay qalabkeeda cusub ee elektaroonigga ah.

en: The power bank has an LED indicator to show the energy level.
so: Power bank-gu wuxuu leeyahay calaamad LED ah oo muujisa heerka tamarta.

en: The dolphin is a reminder of the beauty of the Somali coast.
so: Doorbiinku waa xusuus muujinaysa quruxda xeebaha Soomaaliya.

en: Hibo's story shows how modern gadgets connect tradition and future.
so: Sheekada Hibo waxay muujinaysaa sida qalabka casriga ahi isugu xiro hiddaha iyo mustaqbalka.

en: She is excited to learn more about digital photography.
so: Waxay aad u xiisaynaysaa inay wax badan ka barato sawir-qaadista dhijitaalka ah.

en: The tablet is a versatile tool for both work and play.
so: Tablet-ku waa qalab dhinacyo badan loo isticmaali karo shaqada iyo madaddaalada dartiis.

en: Hibo's smartphone is always updated with the latest security.
so: Taleefanka Hibo mar walba waa la cusboonaysiiyaa ammaan dartiis.

en: The ocean breeze felt cool against her skin at the beach.
so: Nacaybka badda ayaa ahaa mid qabow oo maqaarkeeda ku dhacayay xeebta.

en: I am committed to helping you master the Somali language.
so: Waxaan u heellanahay inaan kaga caawiyo inaad si fiican u barato af Soomaaliga.

en: Let's keep moving forward with more vocabulary and stories.
so: Aan sii amba-qaadno ereyo iyo sheekooyin badan oo kale.

en: Axmed was an ambitious student who studied economics and lived in a busy apartment building.
so: Axmed wuxuu ahaa arday hammi sare leh oo bartay cilmiga dhaqaalaha, kuna noolaa dhisme dabaqyo ah oo mashquul badan.

en: He owned a sleek silver laptop and a high-speed internet router to attend his online lectures.
so: Wuxuu lahaa laptop qalin ah oo qurux badan iyo router internet-ka dheereeya si uu uga qayb galo casharradiisa internet-ka.

en: In his small kitchen, he had an air fryer and a coffee maker to save time during exams.
so: Jikadiisa yar, wuxuu ku haystay mashiinka cuntada lagu dubo (air fryer) iyo mashiinka qaxwada si uu waqtiga u badbaadiyo xilliga imtixaanka.

en: One morning, he looked out of his balcony and saw a falcon soaring above the skyscrapers.
so: Subax kasta, wuxuu ka eegi jiray balakoonkiisa wuxuuna arki jiray hilaac (falcon) ka dhex duulaya dabaqyada dhaadheer dhexdooda.

en: Axmed breakfast consisted of oatmeal with sliced strawberries, walnuts, and a drizzle of honey.
so: Quraacda Axmed waxay ka koobnayd mishaari leh strawberries la googooyey, kooko (walnuts), iyo xoogaa malab ah.

en: He kept a small hamster in a glass tank near his desk for companionship while studying.
so: Wuxuu miiskiisa agtiisa ku haystay haamaster yar oo ku jira weel dhalo ah si uu u weheliyo inta uu wax baranayo.

en: Axmed used a laser printer to produce copies of his business plan for a new startup.
so: Axmed wuxuu isticmaalay mashiinka daabacaadda (laser printer) si uu u soo saaro nuqullo qorshe ganacsi oo ku saabsan shirkad cusub.

en: He noticed the air conditioner was making a noise, so he used a screwdriver to tighten its cover.
so: Wuxuu arkay in qaboojiyaha (AC) uu dhawaaq samaynayo, markaasuu isticmaalay kashabiito si uu daboolkiisa u adkeeyo.

en: For a late-night snack, he prepared a bowl of cherries and a handful of almonds.
so: Fududayn habeen dambe ah, wuxuu diyaarsaday baaquli jeeriga (cherries) ah iyo sacab lowska almonds-ka ah.

en: A stray cat often visited his window, and he would give it a small piece of cooked chicken.
so: Bisad dibadda joogta ayaa mar walba daaqaddiisa u timaada, wuxuuna siin jiray cad yar oo hilib digaag ah oo karsan.

en: Axmed's focus on his studies shows his dedication to building a successful future.
so: Diiradda uu Axmed saaray waxbarashadiisa waxay muujinaysaa dadaalka uu ugu jiro dhisidda mustaqbal guuleysta.

en: An air fryer is a great tool for a student who wants to eat healthy but lacks time.
so: Air fryer-ka waa qalab aad u wanaagsan oo u roon ardayga raba inuu cunto caafimaad leh cuno balse waqti la'aan ah.

en: The falcon represents the sharp vision Axmed has for his business goals.
so: Hilaaca wuxuu u taagan yahay aragtida fog ee uu Axmed u leeyahay hadafyadiisa ganacsi.

en: I can assist you in learning more terms related to technology and academic success.
so: Waxaan kagu caawin karaa inaad barato ereyo badan oo ku saabsan tiknoolajiyada iyo guusha waxbarashada.

en: List the appliances Axmed has in his kitchen to help him study efficiently.
so: Iii qor agabka uu Axmed ku haysto jikadiisa si ay uga caawiyaan inuu si hufan wax u barto.

en: What did Axmed see flying above the skyscrapers in the city?
so: Maxuu Axmed arkay isagoo ka duulaya dabaqyada dhaadheer ee magaalada dusheeda?

en: Identify the two nuts mentioned in Axmed's snacks and breakfast.
so: Sheeg labada nooc ee lowska ah ee lagu xusay fududaynta iyo quraacda Axmed.

en: Describe the contents of Axmed's business plan produced by the laser printer.
so: Sifeey waxyaabaha ku jira qorshe ganacsiyeedka Axmed ee uu soo saaray mashiinka daabacaadda.

en: Write a short summary of Axmed's daily routine as a student.
so: Qor koobitaan gaaban oo ku saabsan hawl-maalmeedka Axmed ee ardaynimo.

en: Explain how high-speed internet contributes to modern distance learning.
so: Sharax sida internet-ka dheereeya uu uga qayb qaato waxbarashada fogaanta ee casriga ah.

en: Compare the lifestyle of Axmed in the apartment to Hibo in the garden house.
so: Isbarbardhig hab-nololeedka Axmed ee dabaqa ku nool iyo Hibo ee guriga beerta leh.

en: What is the Somali word for 'economics' and 'startup' in this context?
so: Waa maxay ereyga Soomaaliga ah ee 'dhaqaalaha' iyo 'ganacsi cusub' ee nuxurkan dhexdiisa?

en: Provide a list of basic supplies Axmed might need for his laser printer.
so: Iii sii liiska agabka aasaasiga ah ee uu Axmed u baahan karo mashiinkiisa daabacaadda.

en: Check the translation of 'air conditioner' and 'balcony' for accuracy.
so: Hubi turjumaadda 'qaboojiyaha' iyo 'balakoonka' si ay u noqoto mid sax ah.

en: How does an air fryer cook food using hot air circulation?
so: Sidee air fryer-ku cuntada ugu kariyaa isagoo isticmaalaya wareegga hawada kulul?

en: Why are walnuts and almonds considered brain-boosting foods for students?
so: Maxay kookada iyo almonds-ka u tixgeliyaan cuntooyin kor u qaada caqliga ardayda?

en: What are the characteristics of a falcon that make it a great hunter?
so: Waa maxay sifooyinka hilaaca ee ka dhiga ugaarsade aad u wanaagsan?

en: How can a startup business contribute to the local economy of a city?
so: Sidee ganacsi cusub oo soo kordhay uu wax uga qaban karaa dhaqaalaha deegaanka ee magaalada?

en: Explain why it is important to maintain an air conditioner filter.
so: Sharax sababta ay muhiim u tahay in la nadiifiyo miiraha qaboojiyaha (AC filter).

en: What is the importance of a coffee maker for someone with a busy schedule?
so: Waa maxay muhiimadda mashiinka qaxwadu u leeyahay qof leh jadwal mashquul badan?

en: How do cats communicate with humans when they are hungry?
so: Sidee bisaduhu ula xiriiraan bini'aadanka marka ay gaajaysan yihiin?

en: Why is a laser printer better than an inkjet printer for business documents?
so: Maxay mashiinka laser-ka ee daabacaadda u wanaagsan yahay mashiinka inkjet-ka marka loo eego dukumentiyada ganacsiga?

en: How does technology help students collaborate on projects remotely?
so: Sidee tiknoolajiyadu uga caawisaa ardayda inay iska kaashadaan mashaariicda iyagoo kala fog?

en: What is the best way to manage a student budget in a big city?
so: Waa maxay habka ugu wanaagsan ee loo maareeyo miisaaniyadda ardayga ee magaalo weyn?
Fursaddu mar kaliya ayay albaabka garaacdaa (Ka faa'iidayso fursadda).

en: The pen is mightier than the sword.
so: Qalinku wuu ka awood badan yahay seefta (Aqoontu waa awood).

en: Early to bed and early to rise makes a man healthy, wealthy, and wise.
so: Inaad goor hore seexato oo goor hore kacdo waxay ku dhaxalsiisaa caafimaad, hanti, iyo xikmad.

en: A journey of a thousand miles begins with a single step.
so: Safarka kunka mayl ah wuxuu ka bilaabmaa hal tallaabo.

en: Rome was not built in a day.
so: Roma maalin laguma dhisin (Guushu waqti bay u baahan tahay).

en: The air fryer uses very little oil to make crispy french fries.
so: Air fryer-ka wuxuu isticmaalaa saliid aad u yar si uu u sameeyo baradhada shiilan oo qallafsan.

en: Axmed's coffee maker can be programmed to start at six in the morning.
so: Mashiinka qaxwada ee Axmed waxaa la nidaamin karaa inuu bilaabo lixda subaxnimo.

en: The falcon has incredible eyesight and can spot prey from high up.
so: Hilaacu wuxuu leeyahay arag cajiib ah wuxuuna ugaarta ka arki karaa meel sare.

en: He added a handful of cherries to his bowl of oatmeal.
so: Wuxuu sacab jeeriga (cherries) ah ku daray baaquligii mishaarida ahaa.

en: The laser printer produces sharp black and white text documents.
so: Mashiinka daabacaadda laser-ka wuxuu soo saaraa dukumentiyo qoraal ah oo madow iyo cadaan cad ah.

en: Axmed cleaned the balcony floor with a mop and warm water.
so: Axmed wuxuu ku nadiifiyey sagxadda balakoonka masaxad iyo biyo diirran.

en: The air conditioner display shows the current room temperature.
so: Shaashadda qaboojiyaha waxay muujinaysaa heerka kulka ee qolka.

en: He uses a wireless mouse to navigate his laptop screen faster.
so: Wuxuu isticmaalaa mouse bilaa xadhig ah si uu laptop-ka ugu dhex mushaaxo si degdeg ah.

en: The hamster's cage is equipped with a water bottle and a food bowl.
so: Khaanadda haamaster-ka waxaa ku jira dhalada biyaha iyo baaquliga cuntada.

en: Axmed's startup idea involves a new app for food delivery.
so: Fikradda ganacsi ee Axmed waxay ku saabsan tahay app cusub oo cuntada lagu geeyo.

en: The almond is a nutritious seed that is often called a nut.
so: Almond-ku waa iniinyo nafaqo leh oo badanaa loogu yeero lowska.

en: The cat purred when Axmed scratched its ears gently.
so: Bisaddii ayaa sanqadh naxariis leh samaysay markii uu Axmed dhegaheeda u xoqay si tartiib ah.

en: He replaced the toner cartridge in the laser printer yesterday.
so: Wuxuu beddelay khadkii (toner) mashiinka daabacaadda shalay.

en: The air fryer is easy to clean because it has a non-stick coating.
so: Air fryer-ka waa fududahay in la nadiifiyo sababtoo ah ma laha meel ay cuntadu ku dhegto.

en: Axmed's balcony has a beautiful view of the city skyline at night.
so: Balakoonka Axmed wuxuu leeyahay muuqaal qurux badan oo ah dabaqyada magaalada habeenkii.

en: The coffee maker's filter needs to be rinsed after every use.
so: Miiraha mashiinka qaxwadu wuxuu u baahan yahay in la dhaqo isticmaal kasta ka dib.

en: The falcon dived at a high speed to catch its target.
so: Hilaacu wuxuu ku soo booday xawaare sare si uu u qabto hadafkiisa.

en: He keeps his walnuts in a glass jar to keep them crunchy.
so: Wuxuu kookadiisa ku haystaa weel dhalo ah si ay u ahaadaan kuwo qallafsan.

en: Axmed's startup team meets once a week via video conference.
so: Kooxda ganacsiga Axmed waxay kulmaan toddobaadkii mar iyagoo isticmaalaya muuqaal.

en: The air conditioner remote control has a timer function.
so: Hagaha fog (remote) ee qaboojiyaha wuxuu leeyahay saacad xaddidan.

en: He used a stapler to join the pages of his report together.
so: Wuxuu isticmaalay mashiinka isku-kaba-waraaqaha (stapler) si uu u isugu xiro bogga warbixintiisa.

en: The laser printer can print up to thirty pages per minute.
so: Mashiinka laser-ka ee daabacaadda wuxuu daabaci karaa ilaa soddon bog daqiiqaddii.

en: Axmed's hamster loves to exercise on its running wheel at night.
so: Haamaster-ka Axmed wuxuu jecel yahay inuu ku jimicsado shaagga orodka habeenkii.

en: The coffee maker uses ground beans to produce a rich aroma.
so: Mashiinka qaxwadu wuxuu isticmaalaa bun shiidan si uu u soo saaro caraf udgoon.

en: The air fryer can also be used to dehydrate fruits like apples.
so: Air fryer-ka sidoo kale waxaa loo isticmaali karaa in lagu engejiyo miro sida tufaaxa.

en: Axmed's balcony is a great place to relax after a long day of study.
so: Balakoonka Axmed waa meel aad u wanaagsan oo lagu nasto ka dib maalin dheer oo waxbarasho ah.

en: The falcon is protected by law in many parts of the world.
so: Hilaacu wuxuu ku xidhan yahay sharciga oo waa la ilaaliyaa meelo badan oo adduunka ah.

en: Axmed received a scholarship to study international trade and moved to a larger office space.

en: Axmed's lunch often included quinoa salad with avocado, chickpeas, and a dash of olive oil.

en: Axmed used a level tool to make sure his new bookshelves were perfectly straight.

en: A small lizard crawled on the office wall, catching a fly with its lightning-fast tongue.

en: Axmed's transition from a student to a business leader is truly inspiring.
