en: Axmed expanded his business into real estate and began developing sustainable housing projects.
so: Axmed wuxuu ganacsigiisa ku ballaariyey hantida maguurtada ah, wuxuuna bilaabay horumarinta mashaariicda guryaha ee waara.

en: He used a 3D printer to create miniature models of the apartment complexes he planned to build.
so: Wuxuu isticmaalay mashiinka daabacaadda tirii diiga si uu u abuuro moodallo yaryar oo ah dhismooyinka dabaqyada ee uu qorsheeyey dhisidooda.

en: To measure the land accurately, his team used a total station and a long measuring tape.
so: Si dhulka si sax ah loogu cabbiro, kooxdiisu waxay isticmaaleen aaladda total station iyo cajalad cabbir oo dheer.

en: In the construction site, he saw a beaver building a dam in the nearby stream, showing nature's engineering.
so: Goobta dhismaha, wuxuu ku arkay af-mishaar (beaver) ka dhisaya biyo-xireen durdurka dhow, taasoo muujinaysa injineernimada dabeecadda.

en: Axmed's breakfast now included papaya slices, almonds, and a glass of fresh camel milk.
so: Quraacda Axmed hadda waxaa ku jiray googo' babbay ah, almonds, iyo koob caano geel oo cusub.

en: He installed solar panels on the roofs of his buildings to provide clean and renewable energy.
so: Wuxuu muraayadaha cadceedda (solar panels) ku rakibay saqafyada dhismooyinkiisa si uu u bixiyo tamar nadiif ah oo dib loo cusboonaysiin karo.

en: Axmed used a heavy-duty electric drill to secure the frames of the solar panels.
so: Axmed wuxuu isticmaalay mashiinka daloolinta (drill) ee xooggan si uu u adkeeyo qaab-dhismeedka muraayadaha cadceedda.

en: He noticed the bricks were high quality, so he used a spirit level to check their alignment.
so: Wuxuu arkay in lebenku ahaa mid tayo leh, markaasuu isticmaalay miisaanka biyaha (spirit level) si uu u hubiyo sinnaantooda.

en: For a snack at the site, he shared some dates and roasted peanuts with the construction workers.
so: Fududayn ahaan goobta dhismaha, wuxuu shaqaalaha dhismaha la wadaagay timir iyo loos duban.

en: A crane flapped its long wings and flew over the scaffolding of the new skyscraper.
so: Karaan (crane) ayaa lulay baalasheeda dhaadheer, wuxuuna ka dul duulay tiirarka dhismaha (scaffolding) ee dabaqa cusub.

en: Axmed's vision for modern Somali cities includes green spaces and eco-friendly materials.
so: Aragtida Axmed ee magaalooyinka casriga ah ee Soomaaliya waxaa ku jira goobo cagaaran iyo qalab deegaanka u saaxiib ah.

en: A 3D printer allows architects to visualize their designs in three dimensions quickly.
so: Mashiinka daabacaadda 3D wuxuu u oggolaanayaa naqshadeeyayaasha inay si degdeg ah u arkaan nashqadahooda saddex dhinac ah.

en: The beaver is known as nature's architect because it modifies its environment significantly.
so: Af-mishaarka waxaa loo yaqaannaa naqshadeeyaha dabeecadda sababtoo ah wuxuu si weyn u beddelaa deegaankiisa.

en: I can help you translate complex engineering and construction terms into Somali.
so: Waxaan kugu caawin karaa inaad ereyo adag oo injineernimo iyo dhismo ah u turjunto af Soomaali.

en: List the tools Axmed's team used for land measurement and solar panel installation.
so: Iii qor qalabka ay kooxda Axmed u isticmaaleen cabbirka dhulka iyo rakibidda muraayadaha cadceedda.

en: What fruit and milk did Axmed have for his energetic breakfast today?
so: Miro noocee ah iyo caano noocee ah ayuu Axmed u quraacday maanta si uu tamar u helo?

en: Identify the two birds or animals that Axmed saw near the construction site.
so: Sheeg labada shimbirood ama xayawaan ee uu Axmed ku arkay agagaarka goobta dhismaha.

en: Describe the benefits of using solar panels in a large housing complex.
so: Sifeey faa'iidooyinka ay leedahay in muraayadaha cadceedda laga isticmaalo dhismooyinka guryaha ee waaweyn.

en: Write a short paragraph about the role of a 3D printer in modern real estate.
so: Qor baaraagraf gaaban oo ku saabsan doorka mashiinka 3D printer-ka ee hantida maguurtada ah ee casriga ah.

en: Explain how a spirit level ensures that a wall is built perfectly straight.
so: Sharax sida miisaanka biyaha (spirit level) u hubiyo in gidaarku u dhisman yahay si qumman.

en: Compare the engineering skills of a beaver to the human engineers on Axmed's team.
so: Isbarbardhig xirfadaha injineernimo ee af-mishaarka iyo injineerada bini'aadanka ah ee kooxda Axmed.

en: What is the Somali word for 'real estate' and 'sustainable' in this context?
so: Waa maxay ereyga Soomaaliga ah ee 'hantida maguurtada ah' iyo 'waara' ee nuxurkan dhexdiisa?

en: Provide a list of safety gear needed on a construction site.
so: Iii sii liiska agabka badbaadada ee looga baahan yahay goobta dhismaha.

en: Check the spelling of 'scaffolding' and 'excavator' in the Somali translation.
so: Hubi higgaadda 'tiirarka dhismaha' iyo 'mashiinka qodista' ee turjumaadda Soomaaliga.

en: How does renewable energy reduce the operational costs of a modern building?
so: Sidee tamarta dib loo cusboonaysiin karo u yareysaa kharashka ku baxa dhismaha casriga ah?

en: Why is camel milk considered more nutritious than cow milk in many cultures?
so: Maxay caanaha geelu ugu tixgeliyaan inay ka nafaqo badan yihiin caanaha lo'da dhaqamo badan dhexdiis?

en: What materials do beavers use to build their strong underwater dams?
so: Agab noocee ah ayay af-mishaarradu u isticmaalaan inay ku dhistaan biyo-xireennadooda xooggan ee biyaha hoostooda ah?

en: How can 3D printing technology reduce the waste in construction projects?
so: Sidee tiknoolajiyada 3D-ga ee daabacaadda u yareyn kartaa qashinka mashaariicda dhismaha?

en: Explain the importance of accurate land surveying before starting a foundation.
so: Sharax muhiimadda ay leedahay cabbirka dhulka ee saxda ah ka hor intaan la bilaabin aasaaska.

en: What are the environmental impacts of modern skyscrapers on city air quality?
so: Waa maxay saameynta deegaanka ee dabaqyada dhaadheer ku leeyihiin tayada hawada magaalada?

en: How do cranes migrate across continents using thermal air currents?
so: Sidee karaanadu (cranes) ugu guuraan qaaradaha iyagoo isticmaalaya hirarka hawada kulul?

en: Why is it important to use eco-friendly materials in sustainable housing?
so: Maxay muhiim u tahay in agabka deegaanka u saaxiibka ah loo isticmaalo guryaha waara?

en: How does city planning improve the quality of life for its residents?
so: Sidee naqshadaynta magaaladu u horumarisaa tayada nolosha dadka deggan?

en: What is the best way to maintain a solar power system for a long time?
so: Waa maxay habka ugu wanaagsan ee lagu daryeeli karo nidaamka tamarta cadceedda muddo dheer?

en: Great oaks from little acorns grow.
so: Geedaha waaweyn waxay ka baxaan miraha yaryar (Wax weyn ayaa ka dhasha wax yar).
Laba jeer cabbir, hal marna goo (Ka fiirso ka hor intaanad ficil samayn).

en: Home is where the heart is.
so: Gurigu waa halka ay raaxadu ku jirto (Qalbigaaga halkuu jiro ayaa gurigaaga ah).

en: The foundation is the most important part of a house.
so: Aasaasku waa qaybta ugu muhiimsan ee guriga.

en: Build your house on a rock, not on sand.
so: Gurigaaga ku dhis dhagax, ha ku dhisin ciid (Aasaas adag yeelo).

en: The 3D printer finished the architectural model with extreme precision.
so: Mashiinka 3D-ga wuxuu ku dhameeyay moodalkii dhismaha si aad u saxan.

en: Axmed's solar panels generated enough power for the entire office floor.
so: Muraayadaha cadceedda ee Axmed waxay soo saareen tamar ku filan dhammaan dabaqa xafiiska.

en: The beaver used its sharp teeth to cut through the thick branches.
so: Af-mishaarku wuxuu isticmaalay ilkahiisa afka badan si uu u gooyo laamaha dhumucda weyn.

en: He checked the blueprint on his tablet to verify the room dimensions.
so: Wuxuu tablet-kiisa ka hubiyey naqshadda (blueprint) si uu u xaqiijiyo cabbirka qolalka.

en: The electric drill has a rechargeable battery for use in remote areas.

en: Axmed used a sledgehammer to break down an old concrete wall.

en: The spirit level showed that the floor was perfectly horizontal.
so: Miisaanka biyuhu wuxuu muujiyey in sagxaddu ay si sax ah u siman tahay.

en: Construction workers wore hard hats and high-visibility vests for safety.

en: The excavator dug a deep trench for the building's water pipes.

en: He used a laser level to project a straight line across the large site.

en: The 3D printer can use different materials like plastic, resin, and even concrete.
so: Mashiinka 3D-ga wuxuu isticmaali karaa agab kala duwan sida caagga, xabagta resin-ka, iyo xataa shubka.

en: Axmed's solar panels have a tracking system to follow the sun's path.
so: Muraayadaha cadceedda ee Axmed waxay leeyihiin nidaam daba-gal oo raaca jihada qorraxta.

so: Biyo-xireenka af-mishaarku wuxuu abuuray deegaan qoyan oo cusub oo ay degto makhluuqaad badan.

so: Axmed wuxuu isticmaalay malawiye (trowel) si uu u mariyo dhoobada shubka ah inta u dhaxaysa lebenka.

so: Miisaanka biyuhu waa qalab muhiim u ah hubinta in dhismuhu uu yahay mid deggan.

en: The spirit level has a green liquid that makes the bubble easy to see.
so: Miisaanka biyaha wuxuu leeyahay dareere cagaaran oo ka dhiga xumbada mid si fudud loo arko.

en: Construction sites can be dangerous, so proper training is required.
so: Goobaha dhismaha waxay noqon karaan kuwo khatar ah, markaas waxaa loo baahan yahay tababar habboon.

so: Mashruuca cusub ee Axmed wuxuu diiradda saarayaa nolosha dadka badan ee leh agabka casriga ah.

en: The excavator operator must be skilled to navigate the tight spaces.
so: Wada mashiinka qodista waa inuu ahaado mid xirfadaysan si uu u dhex maro meelaha cidhiidhiga ah.

en: He used a ladder to reach the top of the solar panel array.
so: Wuxuu isticmaalay sallaan si uu u gaaro meesha ugu sarreysa ee muraayadaha cadceedda.

so: Mashiinka 3D-ga wuxuu isticmaalaa nidaam lagu magacaabo 'wax-ku-kordhin' si uu wax u dhiso.

en: Axmed's solar energy system reduces the building's carbon footprint.
so: Nidaamka tamarta cadceedda ee Axmed wuxuu yareeyaa qiiqa wasakhaysan ee dhismaha.

en: The beaver's fur is waterproof, allowing it to stay warm in cold water.
so: Dhogorta af-mishaarku biyuhu ma dhex maraan, taasoo u oggolaanaysa inay ku kululaato biyaha qabow.

en: He used a wrench to tighten the bolts on the heavy machinery.
so: Wuxuu isticmaalay kiciye si uu u adkeeyo boolasha mashiinnada cul-culus.

so: Mashiinka daloolintu waa qalab dhinacyo badan loo isticmaali karo oo u roon xirfadlayaasha iyo dadka guriga wax ku karsada.

en: Axmed used a sander to smooth the surface of the wooden balcony.
so: Axmed wuxuu isticmaalay mashiinka lagu ruxo (sander) si uu u simo dusha balakoonka qoriga ah.

so: Miisaanka biyuhu waa mid waara, waana uu u adkaysan karaa xaaladaha adag ee goobta shaqada.

en: Axmed's real estate firm is committed to urban regeneration projects.

so: Baaldiga mashiinka qodista wuxuu u xooggan yahay inuu soo qaado dhagaxaan waaweyn.

so: Mashiinka 3D-ga wuxuu beddelayaa sida aan u tixgelinno dhismaha degdegga ah.

en: Axmed launched a new logistics company using electric vans and delivery drones to transport goods.

en: He purchased a private jet for international business trips and hired a skilled pilot.

en: What biological features allow storks to glide for long periods without flapping?
so: Waa maxay sifooyinka dabiiciga ah ee u oggolaanaya xuunshada inay hawada dhex mushaaxdo iyadoon baalasha lulun?

en: How can satellite technology improve the safety of maritime and air transport?
so: Sidee tiknoolajiyada dayax-gacmeedku u horumarin kartaa ammaanka gaadiidka badda iyo hawada?

en: Explain the importance of tire pressure for the fuel efficiency of a vehicle.
so: Sharax muhiimadda cadaadiska taayirka u leeyahay badbaadinta shidaalka (ama korontada) gaariga.

en: What are the environmental benefits of replacing jet fuel with sustainable alternatives?
so: Waa maxay faa'iidooyinka deegaanka ee laga helayo in shidaalka diyaaradda lagu beddelo kuwa waara?

en: How do animals sense magnetic fields to navigate during migration?
so: Sidee xayawaanku u dareemaan dhul-birta (magnetic fields) si ay u qabsadaan jihada guuritaanka?

en: Why is it important to secure drone hardware before every flight mission?
so: Maxay muhiim u tahay in la adkeeyo qalabka drone-ka ka hor hawlgal kasta oo duulista ah?

en: How does global connectivity through aviation affect the Somali economy?
so: Sidee xiriirka caalamiga ah ee dhanka duulista u saameeyaa dhaqaalaha Soomaaliya?

en: What is the best way to manage a large fleet of vehicles using software?
so: Waa maxay habka ugu wanaagsan ee lagu maareeyo tiro badan oo gawaari ah iyadoo la isticmaalayo software?
Cirka ayaa ah halka ugu dambeysa (Ma jiro wax ku xannibi kara).

en: Time flies when you are having fun.
so: Waqtigu wuu duulaa marka aad ku raaxaysanayso (Waqtigu si degdeg ah ayuu u baxaa).
Inaad soo daahdo ayaa ka fiican inaadan waligaa imaan.
Aragtida shimbirta (Inaad wax walba kor ka aragto).

en: Smooth landing is the sign of a good pilot.
so: Degidda deggan waa astaanta duuliyaha wanaagsan.

en: The electric van can travel three hundred kilometers on a single charge.
so: Gaariga korontada wuxuu ku socon karaa saddex boqol oo kiiloomitir hal buuxin kaliya.

en: Axmed's private jet has a sophisticated autopilot system for safety.
so: Diyaaradda khaaska ah ee Axmed waxay leeyahay nidaam casri ah oo iskeed u duula (autopilot).

en: The stork built its nest on top of a tall chimney in the European village.
so: Xuunshadu waxay buulkeeda ka dhisatay qiiq-mareenka dheer ee tuulo ku taal Yurub.

en: He used a multimeter to test the voltage of the electric van's battery.
so: Wuxuu isticmaalay mashiinka multimeter-ka si uu u tijaabiyo korontada batariga gaariga.

en: The delivery drone's camera can transmit high-definition video in real-time.
so: Kamaradda drone-ku waxay soo diri kartaa muuqaal tayo sare leh (HD) si toos ah.

en: Axmed used a torque wrench to tighten the lug nuts on the van's wheels.
so: Axmed wuxuu isticmaalay kiciye gaar ah (torque wrench) si uu u adkeeyo boolasha taayirka.

en: The GPS showed that the shipment would arrive in exactly twenty minutes.
so: GPS-ku wuxuu muujiyey in rarku uu imaan doono muddo labatan daqiiqo ah.

en: Air traffic control gave the pilot permission to descend to ten thousand feet.
so: Hagidda hawada ayaa duuliyaha u oggolaatay inuu u soo dego joogga toban kun oo feet.

en: The electric vehicle produces zero emissions, helping to keep the city air clean.
so: Gaariga korontada ma soo saaro qiiq wasakhaysan, wuxuuna gacan ka geystaa nadiifinta hawada.

en: Axmed used a compressed air hose to clean the dust from the engine bay.
so: Axmed wuxuu isticmaalay tuubada hawada ee cufan si uu boorka uga nadiifiyo mashiinka hoostiisa.

en: The private jet's cabin is pressurized for comfort during high-altitude cruising.
so: Qolka diyaaradda khaaska ah waa mid la xannibay cadaadiska hawada si loogu raaxaysto duulista sare.

en: A stork's beak is long and strong, perfect for catching frogs and fish.
so: Afka xuunshadu waa dheer yahay waana xooggan yahay, waana ku habboon yahay qabashada raxa iyo kalluunka.

en: He checked the flight manifest to ensure all passengers were accounted for.
so: Wuxuu hubiyey liiska rakaabka diyaaradda si uu u xaqiijiyo inay wada joogaan.

en: The electric van uses regenerative braking to recharge the battery while slowing down.
so: Gaariga korontada wuxuu isticmaalaa biriigga tamarta soo celiya si uu batariga u dallado inta uu gaabinayo.

en: Axmed used a handheld scanner to check the barcodes of the incoming packages.
so: Axmed wuxuu isticmaalay mashiinka wax sawira (scanner) si uu u hubiyo sumadda xirmooyinka soo gelaya.

en: The drone's battery level is displayed on the pilot's remote controller screen.
so: Heerka batariga drone-ka wuxuu ka muuqdaa shaashadda hagaha ee duuliyaha.

en: The private jet can reach a maximum speed of nine hundred kilometers per hour.
so: Diyaaradda khaaska ahi waxay gaari kartaa xawaare dhan sagaal boqol oo kiiloomitir saacaddii.

en: A stork can live for over twenty years in the wild with enough food.
so: Xuunshadu waxay duurka ku noolaan kartaa in ka badan labatan sano haddii ay cunto hesho.

en: He used a specialized lubricant to keep the drone's motors running smoothly.
so: Wuxuu isticmaalay saliid gaar ah si uu matoorada drone-ka ugu hayo inay si siman u shaqeeyaan.

en: The electric van's motor is much quieter than a traditional internal combustion engine.
so: Matoorka gaariga korontada aad buu uga aamusan yahay mashiinnada caadiga ah ee shidaalka ku shaqeeya.

en: Axmed used a digital multimeter to diagnose an electrical fault in the charging station.
so: Axmed wuxuu isticmaalay multimeter si uu u ogaado cillad koronto oo ka dhalatay goobta dalladda.

en: The private jet's wings are swept back to reduce drag and increase speed.
so: Baalasha diyaaradda khaaska ah dib ayaa loo iilay si loo yareeyo iska-caabbinta hawada loona kordhiyo xawaaraha.

en: A stork's migration route is passed down from one generation to the next.
so: Waddada guuritaanka xuunshada waxaa la iska dhaxlaa jiilba jiilka ka dambeeya.

en: He used a fire extinguisher to ensure safety in the warehouse's battery storage area.
so: Wuxuu isticmaalay qalabka dab-demiska si uu u sugo ammaanka meesha batariyada lagu kaydiyo ee bakhaarka.

en: The drone has an obstacle avoidance system to prevent collisions with trees.
so: Drone-ku wuxuu leeyahay nidaam uu kaga leexdo caqabadaha si aanu geedaha ugu dhicin.

en: Axmed's electric fleet is powered by a large solar farm outside the city.
so: Gawaarida korontada ee Axmed waxaa lagu dalladaa beerta cadceedda (solar farm) ee weyn ee magaalada dibaddeeda ku taal.

en: The private jet's cockpit has large screens displaying weather and navigation data.
so: Meesha duuliyaha ee diyaaradda (cockpit) waxay leedahay shaashado waaweyn oo muujiya hawada iyo xogta hagidda.

en: A stork's flight is a majestic sight against the golden Somali sunset.
so: Duulista xuunshadu waa muuqaal qurux badan oo ka dhex muuqda qorraxta dahabiga ah ee Soomaaliya.

en: He used a heat gun to seal the protective tubing around the electrical wires.
so: Wuxuu isticmaalay qoriga kulaylka (heat gun) si uu u xiro tuubooyinka difaaca ee ku wareegsan xadhigga korontada.

en: The electric van's dashboard provides real-time feedback on energy consumption.
so: Shaashadda gaariga korontada waxay si toos ah u muujisaa isticmaalka tamarta.

en: Axmed used a hydraulic jack to lift the van for a quick tire change.
so: Axmed wuxuu isticmaalay jidhibka saliidda (hydraulic jack) si uu u qaado gaariga si looga beddelo taayirka.

en: The drone's software is updated wirelessly to improve its flight stability.
so: Software-ka drone-ka waxaa loo cusboonaysiiyaa si bilaa xadhig ah si loo horumariyo duulistiisa.

en: The private jet has a fuel-efficient engine that meets international standards.
so: Diyaaradda khaaska ahi waxay leedahay mashiin shidaalka badbaadiya oo buuxiya heerarka caalamiga ah.

en: A stork's nest can weigh several hundred kilograms after years of building.
so: Buulka xuunshadu wuxuu miisaankiisu gaari karaa dhowr boqol oo kiilo sannado badan oo dhisid ah ka dib.

en: He used a vacuum cleaner to keep the interior of the private jet spotless.
so: Wuxuu isticmaalay mashiinka boodhka nuuga si uu gudaha diyaaradda ugu hayo mid aad u nadiif ah.

en: The electric van's cargo area is temperature-controlled for delivering fresh food.
so: Qaybta rarka ee gaariga korontada waxaa laga xakameeyaa kulaylka si loo geeyo cunto cusub.

en: Axmed used a soldering iron to fix a broken connection on the drone's circuit board.
so: Axmed wuxuu isticmaalay qalabka birta lagu alxamo (soldering iron) si uu u kabo xadhig ka go'ay looxa korontada ee drone-ka.

en: The GPS tracker helps prevent theft and ensures the safety of the drivers.
so: Qalabka GPS-ka wuxuu ka hortagaa xatooyada wuxuuna sugaa ammaanka wadayaasha.

en: The private jet's landing gear retracted smoothly after takeoff.
so: Luga-degidda ee diyaaradda ayaa si siman dib ugu laabtay duulista ka dib.

en: A stork's legs are long and slender, allowing it to wade through shallow water.
so: Luga xuunshadu waa dhaadheer yihiin waana dhuuban yihiin, waxayna u oggolaadaan inay dhex lugayso biyaha gacanta ah.

en: He used a digital caliper to measure the exact thickness of the drone's frame.
so: Wuxuu isticmaalay qalabka cabbirka ee dhijitaalka ah (caliper) si uu u cabbiro dhumucda qaab-dhismeedka drone-ka.

en: The electric van's battery pack is located under the floor to lower the center of gravity.
so: Batariga gaariga korontada wuxuu ku yaallaa sagxadda hoosteeda si uu gaarigu u noqdo mid dheelitiran.

en: Axmed used a pressure washer to clean the exterior of his delivery vans.
so: Axmed wuxuu isticmaalay mashiinka biyaha ku buufiya si uu u nadiifiyo bannaanka gawaaridiisa.

en: The drone can be programmed to follow a specific flight path automatically.
so: Drone-ka waxaa loo habayn karaa inuu si otomaatig ah u raaco waddo duulimaad oo gaar ah.

en: The private jet's flight data recorder is an essential tool for aviation safety.
so: Sanduuqa madow ee diyaaradda (flight data recorder) waa qalab muhiim u ah ammaanka duulista.

en: A stork's wings are broad and powerful for soaring on thermal currents.
so: Baalasha xuunshadu waa ballaaran yihiin waana xooggan yihiin si ay hawada ugu dhex mushaaxdo.

en: He used a screwdriver set to assemble the new office furniture for the logistics hub.
so: Wuxuu isticmaalay qalabka kashabiitooyinka si uu isugu xiro alaabta xafiiska ee xarunta saadka.

en: The electric van can be charged using a standard wall outlet in an emergency.
so: Gaariga korontada waxaa lagu dalladi karaa godka gidaarka ee caadiga ah marka xaalad degdeg ah jirto.

en: Axmed used a level tool to ensure the satellite dish was perfectly aligned.
so: Axmed wuxuu isticmaalay qalabka miisaanka (level tool) si uu u hubiyo in weelka dayax-gacmeedku u siman yahay.

en: The drone's sensors detect high winds and alert the pilot to land safely.
so: Dareemayaasha drone-ka ayaa ogaada dabaysha xooggan waxayna u digaan duuliyaha si uu si ammaan ah u dego.

en: The private jet's engines are maintained by a team of certified aerospace technicians.
so: Mashiinnada diyaaradda khaaska ah waxaa daryeela koox farsamo-yaqaanno duulista ah oo haysta shahaadooyin.

en: A stork is a quiet bird that rarely makes sounds other than clattering its beak.
so: Xuunshadu waa shimbir aamusan oo mar dhif ah samaysa dhawaaq aan ka ahayn garaaca afkeeda.

en: He feels empowered by the ability to connect different parts of the country through logistics.
so: Wuxuu dareemayaa awood dartiis inuu isku xiro qaybaha kala duwan ee dalka dhanka saadka.

en: The electric van's range is increasing every year with better battery technology.
so: Fogaanta uu gaariga korontada socon karo ayaa kordhaysa sannad kasta iyadoo tiknoolajiyada batarigu horumarsanayso.

en: Axmed used a label printer to tag all the storage shelves in the warehouse.
so: Axmed wuxuu isticmaalay mashiinka sumadda daabaca si uu ugu calaamadiyo khaanadaha kaydka ee bakhaarka.

en: The drone's flight time depends on the weight of the package it is carrying.
so: Waqtiga duulista ee drone-ku wuxuu ku xiran yahay miisaanka xirmada uu sido.

en: The private jet provides a quiet environment for Axmed to work during his travels.
so: Diyaaradda khaaska ahi waxay siisaa jawi aamusan oo uu Axmed ku shaqeeyo inta uu safrayo.

en: A stork's return in the spring is often celebrated as a sign of good luck.
so: Soo laabashada xuunshadu xilliga gu'ga badanaa waxaa loo dabaal-degaa sidii calaamad nasiib wanaagsan.

en: He uses a tablet to monitor all the delivery vans on a digital map.
so: Wuxuu isticmaalaa tablet si uu ugu daba-galo dhammaan gawaarida rarka ee khariidadda dhijitaalka ah ka muuqda.

en: Axmed's logistics network is a vital artery for the local economy.
so: Shabakadda saadka ee Axmed waa xidid muhiim u ah dhaqaalaha deegaanka.

en: I am honored to guide you through these advanced Somali lessons.
so: Waxaa sharaf ii ah inaan kugu hoggaamiyo casharradan horumarsan ee af Soomaaliga.

en: Let's keep the journey going with more exciting chapters of Hibo and Axmed's life.
so: Aan sii wadno safarka annagoo wata cutubyo xiiso leh oo ku saabsan nolosha Hibo iyo Axmed.
